keys.Salvage_Ship_Component_Shield_Generator_: Generador de escudo, grado de competición (S2)

rawKeys.Headhunters_Delivery_Outpost_desc_001:
Got a box sitting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that needs to make its way over to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Any chance you can knock this out real quick?

Might be the easiest gig Iâ€™ve ever assigned out. Only real threat would be tripping over your own feet. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.
rawKeys.roughready_delivery_station_desc_001:
Any chance youâ€™re at ~mission(Destination)?

Need a box hustled from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Get it there on time and unbroken and itâ€™ll be the easiest creds youâ€™ll ever earn.   

-Smokey
rawKeys.headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_M_desc_001:
Word came down from the Judge that we're to hit ~mission(Location|Address). It's owned by CFP and security there have been less than hospitable to some of the locals, so they gotta go.

They may talk a big game about bringing security, but they got guns and are more than happy to use 'em.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_maintenance_M_desc_001:
Need somebody handy with tools to pop over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and help out with some repairs. Our last repair guy knocked out most of the fixes but there's still some stuff that could use looking at.

I think if you've got <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to patch up around five pipes</EM4>, you should be covered.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>â€œGuide to Maintenanceâ€</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
rawKeys.cfp_defend_headhunters_M_desc_001:
Headhunters have launched an unprovoked attack against ~mission(Location|Address). Although we don't support the use of violence, Citizens for Prosperity won't let innocent people die. We need qualified security personnel to retake the outpost.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.cfp_defend_boss_Generic_desc_001:
We just received reports of a massive attack against ~mission(Location) by a large group of armed individuals led by ~mission(TargetName), a notorious outlaw who has been threatening Citizens for Prosperity personnel for months. Details are still yet to be confirmed but we know there have been multiple casualties.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any qualified security personnel to go and retake the outposts from these hostile elements. Our understanding is that ~mission(TargetName|Last) tends to hide behind their soldiers, but will emerge if you take enough of the rank-and-file out.

While we don't like to resort to violence, management can see no other way of resolving this situation and continuing our good work in the system.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.headhunters_maintenance_H_desc_001:
The storms over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> are getting to be a real pain in the ass. One of our outposts got absolutely reamed yesterday and needs some serious repairs so we're looking for help.

Figure you'd need to bring <EM4>about six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to deal with at most eight busted pipes</EM4>. We think thatâ€™ll cover, but you'll get exact numbers on site.

Hell with this place.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, that <EM4>â€œGuide to Maintenanceâ€</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_maintenance_local_E_desc_001:
Hey if youâ€™re reading this, we need a hand. An outpost of ours down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> got hit by a nasty storm and suffered some damage. None of our usual techs are available (or alive) to swing by so we wanna hire someone to go fix some fuses (no idea how many but <EM4>no more than three</EM4> I think). If you can bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC canisters to sort out around three pipes</EM4>, we should be good.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>â€œGuide to Maintenanceâ€</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
rawKeys.TarPits_ShipStrip_desc_001:
Got a particular salvage job that we could use some extra hands on. 

We need you to find a ~mission(ship) that got punched out around ~mission(location). Securityâ€™s already searching for it and if they find it, theyâ€™ll ID it for sure and weâ€™ll be in loads of trouble.

So, we want you to make sure that canâ€™t happen. Either tow the ship out of the search area or rip the entire hull off so nobody can tell who it belonged to. Whatever you decide, keep your mouth shut about this. 

Weâ€™ll cred you up and anything you scrap is yours to keep. But if security finds the ship before youâ€™re done, weâ€™ll all be screwed and you wonâ€™t get paid so donâ€™t disappoint.
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_gen_vlrt_desc_001:
Got a small fry who thinks they can hit the Headhunters and get away with it. So ~mission(TargetName) tried to knock over one of our stashes and think they can get away with it. 

Last we heard they were spotted around ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to head over and send a very clear message who is the reigning power in the system.

Do it quick and clean.

Stows out.
rawKeys.vaughn_assassination_E_desc_001:
~mission(TargetName) needs to be eliminated. My contacts tell me they will have one or two escorts, but nothing you can't handle. Find them near ~mission(Location|Address).

Most Sincerely,
Vaughn
rawKeys.cdf_openbounty_desc_001:
The Civilian Defense Force needs YOU! Everyday, in the Stanton system innocent civilians are preyed upon by vicious outlaws and heartless criminals.

NO MORE.

Under the authority of the UEE and the Militia Mobilization Initiative, the CDF is deputizing all combat minded individuals in good legal standing* to engage and neutralize any individuals or vehicles that they verify to have an active CrimeStat.

In exchange for these selfless contributions to the general populaces safety, the CDF will financially compensate those who successfully bring these criminals to justice with a reward** of ~mission(RewardValue_Wanted1) UEC per outlaw dealt with. 

Now is your chance to help bring about a positive change for yourself and all other Stanton travelers. Sign up today and do your part!



* Be aware, acquiring a CrimeStat will revoke CDF membership and cancel any outstanding contracts.
** Please note, criminals encountered as part of paid contract work do not qualify for the reward.
rawKeys.vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_intro:
Firstly, allow me to introduce myself. To put it rather dramatically, I deal in lives. 

People hire me when some soul needs to be extinguished, and I in return employ the perfect person to serve as the extinguishant. This provides security to all parties involved as none know the identity of the other. An ideal situation as far as these things go.

I was recently made aware that you may possess skills that would make you of service to me and decided that it would be worthwhile to pursue the validity of this claim. 
 
If you have any interest in forging a working relationship, I will need a demonstration of said skills. 

Seek out and discreetly kill ~mission(TargetName) over at ~mission(Location|Address).

Do so successfully and you will be rewarded. Not only that, but you will have proven yourself worthy of further consideration.

Sincerely,
Vaughn
rawKeys.vaughn_assassination_M_desc_001:
The latest name for our list is ~mission(TargetName).

They will be traveling around ~mission(Location|Address) in a better class of ship and with a better class of escort. Approach with caution, and try to make this a clean kill.

Regards,
Vaughn
rawKeys.vaughn_assassination_H_desc_001:
Killing ~mission(TargetName) may end up being quite the challenge. They are aboard a well-protected ship near ~mission(Location|Address) and are most likely in the company of skilled escorts.

A cautious approach may be wise.

Warmest Regards,
Vaughn
rawKeys.vaughn_searchbody_space_VH_Desc_001:
It is with deep disappointment that I send this message. A peerless contractor of ours was out on a job, but it seems like the target may have gotten the better of them.

I need you to travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and see if our contractor, <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, is truly gone.

I suspect that the location will be somewhat chaotic since there will most likely still be multiple threats on site. Therefore, a supporting crew is strongly advised.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
rawKeys.headhunters_ChainElimAll_1C_AttackCFP_E_:
Been getting word that CFP security have been getting a little more aggressive and started pushing people out of the homes they've built out of the scrap in the system and they want payback, so they came to us.

Head out to ~mission(Location|Address) and clear out the CFP there. Should be pretty cut and dry with a nice payday.

Stows out.
rawKeys.vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_001:
I have a new assignment for you.

Dispatch ~mission(TargetName). You should be able to find them at ~mission(Location|Address). 

I do not expect them to put up much of a struggle. At least not a formidable one.

Sincerely,
Vaughn
rawKeys.Headhunters_eliminateall_caves_desc_01:
Hey,

Some two-bit thugs are holed up in ~mission(Location|Address). Wouldnâ€™t pay them any mind, except the arrogant skags tried to hit an outpost under our protection.

We chased 'em off with little trouble, but we can't let that kind of disrespect go unpunished. Our Clips are busy with some bigger fish, so we'd like you to take care of this for us. 

Stows out.
rawKeys.vaughn_assassination_S_desc_001:
I fear this is another one of those assignments that will take your full skillset to see to completion.

~mission(TargetName) is aboard a very heavily armed vessel protected by at least two equally armed escorts. They are traveling near ~mission(Location|Address).

Not for the faint of heart.

Fondly,
Vaughn
rawKeys.vaughn_assassination_VH_desc_001:
An tricky assignment has just arrived that I think you will be ideally suited for.

Expect to encounter ~mission(TargetName) aboard a heavily armed vessel near ~mission(Location|Address) and accompanied by some of the most highly-seasoned pilots that can be hired. 

Deal with the escorts as you wish. As long as you kill ~mission(TargetName), I will be more than satisfied.

Respectfully,
Vaughn
rawKeys.Vaughn_EliminateSpecific_FPS_Rockcracker:
I've been having a hard time tracking this target down. They're part of a gang known as the Claw Salamanders who tend to be quite itinerate. However, it seems the group has been trying to get an old QV Breaker Station operational again and I think this just may be the chance to take out ~mission(TargetName) once and for all. 

Start your search at ~mission(Location|Address).  These stations can apparently be quiet cavernous at  times so it may take a bit of effort to locate the target once you're on site.

However, I have all the confidence in your abilities,
Vaughn

There is a member of the Nyx gang the Claw Salamanders, ~mission(TargetName), who has made it on to my naughty list. They had been on the run for quite awhile, but just recently popped back up at an old mining station in the Keeger Belt. Our lucky day shall be their last.  

Word is that you can find them at ~mission(Location|Address).  Unfortunately, there is a strong chance you may have to do some repairs to the station itself before you can gain access to that particular area.

But I'm sure you're more than up to the challenge.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

A request has made its way to my desk regarding the untimely end of one ~mission(TargetName), a member of the Claw Salamander who is currently scuttling around an old QV Breaker Station. 

It is highly likely that you will find them at ~mission(Location|Address).  Be mindful though that with a station this large it may take a bit of searching to track them down. 

Hope you enjoy your time in Nyx,
Vaughn
rawKeys.Adagio_Industrial_Salvage_Universal_Intr: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About us <
As the leading procurer and distributor of salvage rights, Adagio Holdings are now looking to expand into the acquisition and distribution of salvageable materials to both small and large-scale businesses.

> About the job <
As a part of this initiative, we need keen-eyed contractors capable of identifying salvageable materials, efficiently stripping them, and delivering the Recycle Material Composite (RMC) and salvaged components to us.

This introductory contract will require you to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and strip an abandoned ship approved for salvage.

Once you've gathered the RMC, you'll deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
rawKeys.Adagio_BasicSalvage_Desc_01:
Attention:

Rights to a new Salvage Claim are available for purchase. Exclusive access to the shipâ€™s verified coordinates in monitored space will be provided upon confirmed credit transfer. The coordinates will remain accessible as long as the accepted contract is active. When you are satisfied with the amount of material you've salvaged, you may abandon the contract early with no penalty to clear the coordinates from your Starmap.

Claim #~mission(ClaimNumber):
â€¢ SHIP: ~mission(Ship)
â€¢ CAUSE OF ACCIDENT: ~mission(ShipStory)
â€¢ LOCATION: ~mission(location)

Adagio Rights Division
rawKeys.RAIN_collectresources_multiple_GEN_desc_:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, weâ€™ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.BHG_Certification_VeryHard_Desc:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: ~mission(System) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: ~mission(Location)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: With your proven track record, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn an Advanced Tracker License.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD

Ella Tieno

rawKeys.CleanAir_Collect-Milestone1_desc:
Let me start by saying that your continuing work helping the Alliance Aid efforts so far have made a considerable difference not only to us at Rayari, but to the rest of the organizations coordinating with the Collections Division. It's why I wanted to reach out to you directly. 

While we have been making great strides in combating this ongoing health crisis, there is concern amongst our researchers that Molina Mold has the potential to mutate into a new fungal strain. 
In order in ensure that our ongoing investigation into the mold is as accurate as possible, we would like you to head to the source of the growth in Levski and <EM4> harvest new samples of the Molina Mold </EM4> there directly. 

Once you have the samples collected, you will then need to deliver them to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Thank you for your assistance at this vital juncture. 

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

rawKeys.CleanAir_ResourceGathering_Small_MoldRes: Alliance Aid: Small Supply of Research Resource

To all available contractors,

Rayari needs your assistance. As part of the Alliance Aid effort, our scientists have shifted their entire focus to assisting Levski deal with Molina mold. Unfortunately, the teamâ€™s progress has stalled due to a lack of a key resource.

Obtaining it from our regular distributors could take weeks. Considering how many people desperately need help, stopping research for that long would seriously impact our effort. Weâ€™re hoping to find motivated individuals willing to procure and deliver a small scale haul of it for delivery to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.CleanAir_RecoverCargo_Medium_desc:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Cargo Retrieval 
APPROVAL CODE = JJ-12

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Nothing like an emergency to bring out the worst in people. This Molina mold is killing people left and right, and what do the scum of this system decide to do? That's right, they're out there trying to highjack vital shipments. Alliance Aid wants us to make sure they don't get away with it. 

You're going to head to the <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, assess the situation, <EM4>neutralize any remaining hostiles</EM4> in the area, and secure the shipment for delivery to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. I expect these jackers to put up a good fight, so feel free to take along some backup if you want.

Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the cargo.  

This contract is non-negotiable.

rawKeys.CleanAir_Defense-Milestone1_desc:
Since you've been doing so much work helping out the Defense Division I wanted to come to you with this contract direct. It's a bit of a delicate one. Two VIPs fell ill and the worry was that if word got out they were being transported they would become major targets.

Unfortunately, it seems that's exactly what happened. Our attempts to smuggle them from Nyx to Stanton for medical treatment have failed, and now the ship carrying them is under attack. 

We need you to hurry to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, neutralize the attackers and ensure that the cryopods make it safely to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

In fact, I want you to make sure you have a ship that can carry the cryopods just in case their original transport is too damaged to go on.

I sincerely hope you manage to pull this rescue mission off. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Hockrow Agency

rawKeys.mg_miles_capturegang_title_006: Capture Arlington Gang Leader Maltrox Arlington
rawKeys.mg_miles_capturegang_desc_006:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam â€˜Weepyâ€™ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Maltrox Arlington has been keeping a low profile recently, but we think he's come out of hiding. A patrol was refueling at a station when one of their ships was boosted. Maltrox is the most likely suspect. While the regtag was temporarily deactivated, we have been able to trace the shipâ€™s quantum signature and have provided you those coordinates.

A third generation criminal, the Arlington gang has been under Maltroxâ€™s leadership for the past six years. Be aware, this is a smart, aggressive, and very dangerous target. The more resources you can bring to bear, the more likely it is that we can bring Maltrox in one and for all. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

rawKeys.LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_Intro_title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
rawKeys.LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_Intro_desc:
Hi,  
 
This is Petra Ling, and Iâ€™m proud to offer you a new and exciting opportunity to partner with Ling Family Hauling. When my parents started this company, their goal was to provide fast and reliable courier deliveries around the greater Crusader area. It quickly became a success, and as our reputation grew, so did our operations.  
 
Now, under my stewardship, Ling Family Hauling is taking the next big step â€“ cargo hauling. Demand for this new service is growing faster than I expected, and thatâ€™s great news for both of us.   
 
If youâ€™ve ever wanted to be a hauler, then I can make your dreams come true. Best way to learn something is by doing it, and Iâ€™ve got a haul of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> that needs to go from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

No prior experience is necessary, but hereâ€™s a few things to keep in mind. All pick-ups and deliveries must be done at a freight elevator or autoloaded. You will need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move them around. 
 
Upon successful completion of this delivery, you will be promoted to a â€˜trusted contractorâ€™ status and more hauls will become available to you.     

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling 

 

 

 

Ling Family Hauling knows itâ€™s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our clientâ€™s cargo. To ensure you arenâ€™t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

Reyes Ling

rawKeys.Headhunters_HaulCargo_AToB_OLP_Illegal_d:
Need someone to snag some cargo for us. We were using an old Hathor PAF for dead drops, but a local gang has dug in and we canâ€™t get our shit.

If you feel like kicking some ass, grab the cargo from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

From what Iâ€™ve heard this place is full of all sorts. Wonâ€™t be easy getting out stuff back, but thatâ€™s what weâ€™re paying you for.

rawKeys.CFP_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Description:
More and more CFP ships are being targeted lately, and despite our best efforts to keep our trading routes quiet, we're still losing haulers to outlaw attacks.

Our pilot over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is the latest casualty. It pains me to think about how much we've lost, but as long as there are people who need our help, we have to keep on fighting.

If you have a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>, we need you to head to the above location and recover that cargo.

This won't be easy, the pilot was one of our best and wouldn't go down without a fight. Let's not underestimate these outlaws, bring a trustworthy crew and watch each other's backs.

Once you've got the cargo, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll get it processed.

Good luck and take care,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_ASD_Desc:
RED WIND LINEHAUL 
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' 
----------------------------    

ASD reached out to us as it seems one of their old labs, <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, still has some cargo being stored there they want to get their hands on.

You would fly there in a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size, land in the hangar, load up from the freight elevator, and then transport it all back to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Just be sure to keep your head on swivel while youâ€™re at the facility and try not to let your curiosity get the better of you Abandoned sites like this can be home to all sort of nastiness.  And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. 

BE YOUR BEST â€“ Take pride in the work you do and youâ€™ll do work to be proud of.

The targetâ€™s body should be located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. I need you to give the hopefully deceased an inspection to ensure the job was completed to our standard. 

Do be careful when you arrive at the location. It wouldnâ€™t surprise me if there was a few vultures lurking around.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
rawKeys.SalvageContractor_Difficulty_Hard: Be aware that due to the size of the Claim, a <EM4>Large Salvage Ship is recommended</EM4>.
rawKeys.DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description:
You know when you ask someone a question and you have a feeling theyâ€™re lying, but you choose to give them the benefit of the doubt? Yeah. Thatâ€™s what Iâ€™m dealing with right now.

Two â€œexpertâ€ haulers I hired to transport some gear for me ran into some trouble and ended up ditching my goods over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Needless to say, Iâ€™ve ordered a hit on them, but what I need from you is to go recover that cargo. The tracker says the cargoâ€™s still on the ship, so youâ€™ll just need a <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and your own ship to recover it.

You might run into a couple of scavengers lurking around there, but I doubt youâ€™ll have any trouble with them.

When youâ€™re done, take the stuff to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and Iâ€™ll sort you out with a reward.

-Twitch
rawKeys.CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_E_:
To help protect our pilots, Citizens for Prosperity will often recommend the use of less traditional routes through the system. However, it seems that a gang of outlaws has gotten word and has begun to stage repeated ambushes along one such flightpath. Rather than just go around the problem and risk it persisting along the new route, we feel it we be prudent to meet these outlaws head on.

You and whatever support ships you enlist will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

The bastard is going to need some time to heal so that leaves it to you to clean up the mess. Can you go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy the servers they got stored there? I wanna make sure there's no chance of this info getting out there.

-Stows out

rawKeys.RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_001:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but for our scientists to continue their efforts they need resources that the company's suppliers have been unable to deliver. 

There is a sizeable population of kopions that have been exposed to radiation near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Rayari is seeking an contractor to collect <EM4>irradiated kopion horns</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Due to the scarcity of this resource, we are prepared to pay a high service fee. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_004:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are working day and night to solve the current regen crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need rare resources that the company's suppliers cannot deliver. 

We are therefore seeking a contractor to secure an <EM4>irradiated valakkar egg</EM4>. Our scans have confirmed several radioactive storms with known a valakkar presence on Pyro I, you can find a shuttle near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> that will take you inside the storm. One more thing, analysis indicates that these eggs will decay over time, the state of the egg shouldn't affect our research but sooner would be better.

Due to the health risks associated with radiation exposure that will be needed to deliver a viable sample, Rayari is ready to pay well for anyone who can safely secure and deliver this item.

Once attained, please take this valuable resource to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission01_Desc:
Looking to gain critical hands-on experience battling a variety of targets and situations? Then my Combat Gauntlet might be the perfect fit for you.

Please understand that this course is intended for pilots who have already mastered flying basics and are ready to take their abilities to the next level. If youâ€™re starting off and want to learn the ropes, Iâ€™d recommend logging some hours in an Arena Commander simpod. But for those ready to face a real challenge, I firmly believe that students learn best by doing. 

Thatâ€™s why Iâ€™ve designed these eight scenarios to be as realistic as possible. I promise you this is the closest thing to Navy combat pilot training you can get without enlisting, so donâ€™t expect a lot of hand holding. <EM4>The risk of injury to yourself or your ship should be taken very seriously.</EM4>

GAUNTLET SCENARIOS:
1. Single Targets
2. Multiple Targets
3. Target Priority
4. Target Stealth
5. Missiles and Countermeasures
6. Multi-Crew Targets
7. Corvette with Escorts
8. Capital Ship Encounter

So, if youâ€™re ready to challenge yourself and prove you got what it takes to be a great pilot, the first scenario will focus on handling a single target. Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Situational Awareness â€“ Donâ€™t get so focused on taking a target that you arenâ€™t watching your flight path. No good taking out the enemy if you fly headfirst into an asteroid.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly    


ABOUT GILLYâ€™S FLIGHT SCHOOL 
Instructor Lucas â€œGillyâ€ Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to â€œLaunch Your Piloting Career.â€
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission02_Desc:
Congrats on completing part one of this eight-part course.

Scenario two will focus on how to deal with multiple targets at the same time. Goal here is give you a better handle on how to balance offense and defense.   

Whenever youâ€™re set, grab a combat ship, and head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Pick Your Fight - For situations where youâ€™re coming up against multiple targets of equal threat, your best strategy is to focus on neutralizing one target at a time to gradually reduce the amount of incoming fire.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLYâ€™S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas â€œGillyâ€ Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to â€œLaunch Your Piloting Career.â€
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission03_Desc:
Congrats on completing part two of this eight-part course.   

The third scenario throws tactical considerations into the mix. This time around the attacking ships are from distinct classes with distinct battlefield applications. Knowing what targets to prioritize is vital to surviving engagements against multiple ships.      

Whenever youâ€™re ready, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to get started.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Bigger They Are â€“ Try to evaluate which threat is the most dangerous and take them out first.
- Shields â€“ If youâ€™re taking a lot of damage, donâ€™t be afraid to boost away and let your shields regenerate.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLYâ€™S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas â€œGillyâ€ Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to â€œLaunch Your Piloting Career.â€
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission04_Desc:
Congrats on completing part three of this eight-part course.

Good combat pilots know not all threats are apparent. Itâ€™s the threats you donâ€™t expect that can be the most devastating. Scenario four is focused on how to identify and deal with stealth targets. Hopefully by the end, youâ€™ll understand just how important your radar is in determining who youâ€™re really up against. Expect to have regular and stealth ships hunting you down.    

Make your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> whenever youâ€™re ready, and remember to keep your eyes on your radar.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Surprise Attacks - Pinging your surroundings can sometimes reveal hidden ships. Be ready for contacts to show up unexpectedly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLYâ€™S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas â€œGillyâ€ Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to â€œLaunch Your Piloting Career.â€
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission05_Desc:
Congrats on completing part four of this eight-part course.   

The fifth scenario focuses on defensive tactics. Knowing when to take evasive measures and deploy either decoys or noise countermeasures is essential to your survival. Thatâ€™s why the aggressors in this exercise will be armed with missiles.   

Ensure your countermeasures are fully stocked and then go to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to start.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Ready to Launch - Easy access to your decoys and countermeasures can be critical in your success in dealing with incoming missile fire. 
- Stand and Fight - Resist the temptation to hit the afterburner to escape as youâ€™ll increase your signature and make it easier for the missile to hit you. Theyâ€™re almost certainly much faster than you anyway.
- Close the Gap â€“ While it may seem counterintuitive, getting closer to an enemy ship can be an advantage. Missiles have a minimum range and if youâ€™re inside of it they wonâ€™t be able to get a lock on you.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLYâ€™S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas â€œGillyâ€ Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to â€œLaunch Your Piloting Career.â€
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission06_Desc:
Congrats on completing part five of this eight-part course.

Iâ€™m bringing out the big guns for scenario six. Time for you to go up against larger, multi-crewed ships, which provide a few new challenges. Not only will you have to contend with their enhanced firepower but their multifaceted shields means youâ€™ll have to target one shield face continually to do real damage. Easier said than done when both of yâ€™all are moving at such fast speeds.      

Find your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> whenever you're ready.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>. 

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Size Advantage â€“ When going up against a larger ship, try to stay away from their front as typically this is where the majority of their offensive fire is located. 

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLYâ€™S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas â€œGillyâ€ Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to â€œLaunch Your Piloting Career.â€
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission07_Desc:
Congrats on completing part six of this eight-part course.

Youâ€™ve gained a lot of experience across the past six scenarios, and now itâ€™s time to put it all to practice. Scenario seven puts you up against a corvette-class ship and its escorts. This extended encounter will push you to the limit and test everything you got.   

The only thing left is to understand the limit of your skillset. To put it simply, you canâ€™t do everything yourself. Developing and maintaining relationships with fellow pilots that you can call upon for support is really the last piece of the puzzle. Not saying you can't overcome encounters like this by yourself, but even the Navy doesnâ€™t send their ace pilots on a patrol alone.    

Once you decided whether to do this alone or call in some support, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to kick off the encounter.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Strength in Diversity â€“ Think about the roles your allies will be filling and choose who to bring carefully to help balance strengths and weaknesses. Youâ€™ll want ships capable of taking on the Corvette while others deal with the escort.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLYâ€™S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas â€œGillyâ€ Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to â€œLaunch Your Piloting Career.â€
rawKeys.GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission08_Desc:
Welcome to the final scenario of the Combat Gauntlet.

Throughout this course, youâ€™ve gotten to experience the advanced combat and defensive tactics needed to survive a variety of encounters. Time to take all those new skills and knowledge and see how they hold up against a large capital vessel and some escort ships.

You know the drill by now. Once you and all your allies are set, find your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to see how you do when truly pushed to the limits.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Patience is a Virtue â€“ If youâ€™ve balanced your squadron properly, you should be able to come out on top, just donâ€™t expect it to be a quick fight. Ships this big donâ€™t go down quickly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly

rawKeys.LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description:
Hello,

Some sad news. Unfortunately our hauler ran into some trouble and had to abandoned the cargo they were due to deliver. We haven't heard anything back from them so we're assuming the worse.

We're in the process of contacting their family and are conscious this is a very sensitive time, but also can't afford to leave a job incomplete. Our trackers show the cargo is still intact over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

If you could finish the delivery we would be really grateful. We're not picking up on any nearby ships so it should be safe for you to collect. Bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll take care of the rest.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows itâ€™s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our clientâ€™s cargo. To ensure you arenâ€™t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
rawKeys.headhunters_bombingrun_killship_M_desc_0:
Everyone has been talking about a new player named ~mission(TargetName) who is operating out of ~mission(Location|Address). They've become a real concern for the Headhunters. 

It's time to shut them down. 

Head over, take out ~mission(TargetName|Last) and then clear out any fuel stores they have there to convince anyone remaining to leave. 

Figure after you pull this off, nobody will even remember their name.

-Stows
rawKeys.cfp_defendship_multi_HRT_desc_001:
We just received word that a convoy of Citizen for Prosperity affiliated ships have been targeted by outlaws and that our people are in dire need of assistance. 

If you are available, we need combat ready pilots at ~mission(Location|Address) to defend our people. Note that at this dire time, we cannot afford even a single lost ship and expect with your assistance for all of our people make it out alive.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

rawKeys.headhunters_multikillship_base_Generic_M:
A lotta wannabe gangs have stepped to the Headhunters over the years thinking that they could force their way into the system. We're still here. They aren't. But it seems the survivors of these groups have decided to band together and try again. Guess some people never learn.

Latest group hit a couple of our convoys while on supply runs. Shouldn't be a surprise that the Judge wants to stomp them out quick. We've learned they're out near ~mission(Location|Address) and likely rearming for another attack. 

We want you to go there and make them wish they died with their old gang.

Stows out
rawKeys.EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_De:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Calling for a skilled contractor to recover a displaced shipment located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Client's hauler was transporting some high value cargo when they decided to respond to a distress beacon and got ambushed by a group of outlaws. The client believes their pilot is gone but their cargo could still be recovered.

The information we have so far is that you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> for shifting the goods, as well as your support ships to help deal with the outlaws at the location. 

Client will be expecting the completed delivery to be made to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.CFP_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description:
We were in the process of delivering an urgent shipment to the folks over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> when our pilot ran into a group of outlaws. They tried to run, but it was already too late.

There is silver lining though. The trackers are showing the cargo is still intact, located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. There's a good chance the outlaws are guarding it while they locate a ship big enough to transport everything. While I don't want to risk losing another pilot, the need of the cargo aboard is desperate enough that it justifies the decision to send someone to recover it.

This won't be easy, these outlaws showed our pilot no mercy. You'll need to take them out first before getting the cargo back. Bring a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> for the moving. Deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination)</EM4>  and let's make this right.

Fly safe,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Highpoint_KillAnimals_MultiType_M_desc:
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists are dedicated to keeping the delicate ecosystems of the empire in balance. A client recently hired us to evaluate the environmental impact of a number of invasive creatures near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Weâ€™ve determined that to preserve the natural order of the region a conscientious culling of these species is necessary.  

Looking for someone able and willing to help in this effort. Please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for further information on the creatures being targeted.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
rawKeys.Highpoint_KillAnimals_storm_H_desc_001:
As a consequence of the ongoing radiation storm on Pyro I, some of the invasive kopions have become irradiated. This poses a threat to the health of the indigenous wildlife and to those who live and work in <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. 

We are seeking out a skilled contractor who can cull any irradiated kopions in and around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Do not accept this contract unless you have the proper weapons and equipment that can reliably function in a radioactive environment. 

Your compensation will be adjusted to match the risks associated with this contract.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
rawKeys.TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_BigBooma: Wikelo find very strange but functional weapon while wandering through your systems. It very simple but very effective. If you bring me things, I show you what I do to it.\n\nVery fun.
rawKeys.headhunters_sabotage_generators_E_CFP_de:
We got big plans about to go down but unfortunately Citizens for Prosperity have people nearby at  ~mission(Location|Address).

Since I can't afford to have those bastards cockin' things up for us, I want you to go there and take out their power generators.

Should keep them sidelined until we're done with our business. 

-Stows out
rawKeys.cfp_bounty_desc_HeadHunters_001:
This is a general warning. We have learned that the Headhunters are transporting a large amount of weapons into the system with the intent of launching attacks against CFP-owned settlements.

While we believe that change can only come to this system through nonviolence. The presence of these weapons will undoubtedly cause considerably more bloodshed and devastation so we want to remove them from the equation.

Any of our supporters with appropriate combat training are asked to undertake this dangerous assignment out near ~mission(Location|Address). We will compensate you for the tremendous risk you are taking.

Thank you and be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Eckhart_ShipAmbush_VH_desc:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A high profile client recently lost an important shipment when a pilot double-crossed them and ran off with their product. After weeks of hunting weâ€™ve discovered that they were connected with an outlaw pack, so the client is looking to us to deter similar future issues from arising. The ultimate target is the pilot of a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, who leads the crew responsible. This wonâ€™t be easy. They donâ€™t go anywhere without escort fighters and sub-capital ships. Thatâ€™s why we highly recommend that you find a trusted friend or two who can handle this with you.  
  
Intel gathered by our analysts indicates that they frequently fly by an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> which would provide an excellent area to stage a surprise strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. Weâ€™re also adding a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> thatâ€™ll go to the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.BitZeros_blackbox_Intro_Desc_001:
Who we are and what we do is not important. All you gotta know is that we need things to get done and we pay people to do it.

If everything goes well, we donâ€™t ever have to meet. Doesnâ€™t that sound good?

Got a good one to start you off, nice and simple. Thereâ€™s a blackbox from a downed ship at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that we want.

All you have to do is take it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4> and you get paid. Easy right? Watch out for scavs, you never know what kind of weirdos are hanging around these abandoned ships.

-Bit Zeros
rawKeys.DeadSaints_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_:
We're looking for someone discreet to move a new batch of altruciatoxin to a number of buyers . Yeah, it's illegal, but only if you get caught. 

The shipment is at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. You'll need to take it to these drop points:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

Be sure your ship can carry size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers, and don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. Not sure how you're planning on moving the boxes, otherwise.

-Twitch
rawKeys.DeadSaints_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_:
One of our best distributors got busted in Stanton so we need a replacement. The guy was an incredible salesman, but a shit smuggler. We need someone who won't run face-first into a security patrol or a pack of pirates to pick up some merchandise at these locations:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

And bring it all to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> before security catches on to what's happening. You'll need enough space on your ship for size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> should make loading and unloading nice and easy. 

-Twitch
rawKeys.DeadSaints_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_:
If you've got a fast ship, can discreetly carry size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers, and love getting a huge payout, we need you to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> immediately and take what you find there to these drop points:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)  

The buyers are paying a premium to get their hands on fresh stormwal meat. Stay sharp. If security catches you with this, it's your ass on the line. If you're smart, you'll use a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded up quick. 

-Twitch

We've got a shipment of contraband that needs to be hauled to a couple of different places. If you like creds, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, load everything up, and bring it to these drop points:  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

You're gonna need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move the boxes and enough room in your cargo hold for size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers. 

Avoid other ships if you can. Security will bust you if they figure out what you're hauling, and raiders will just take it for themselves. 

-Twitch
rawKeys.DeadSaints_HaulCargo_AToB_intro_desc:
Call me Twitch. I run the Dead Saints. 

I doubt this is the first time you've heard of us, but in case you haven't, we do a lot of things, but one of them is transporting goods that need discreet handling. 

I got your info from one of my contacts. They say you've got the stuff we like in a hauler, which works for me, because we're looking for one. 

Here's my proposal â€“ we're offering creds to the pilot that can transport some special cargo for us. Your shipâ€™s hold will need room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and you'll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading. All you have to do is get everything from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> without getting security involved. 
 
If you can pull the job off, the Saints will have more contracts for you down the line. 

-Twitch
rawKeys.DeadSaints_HaulCargo_AToB_title: DEAD SAINTS -- ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank, ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Scale Cargo Run
rawKeys.DeadSaints_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_ToGrimHEX:
If you're looking for creds, the Saints need someone with hauling experience to do a supply run from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

You're gonna need a ship that can hold size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move the boxes around. 

Don't open the crates but just so you know, most of this stuff is legal but not all of it. Try not to cross paths with anyone who might make that a problem for you. Get me?

-Twitch
rawKeys.DeadSaints_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Cryopods_:
Got an interesting one. Some folks who were suckered into life/labor contracts with Hurston Dynamics want to get as far from Lorville as they possibly can. They struck a deal with a people mover and got themselves put on ice. Now they just need someone to pick them up and give them a ride. 

If you're up for some popsicle smuggling, you'll find ~mission(total) cryopods at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that need to go to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Make sure you have space in your cargo hold for size <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> containers. If you use a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, you should be able to get everyone loaded up before Hurston security catches on. 

HD isn't too keen on anyone slipping out of their contracts, so watch your back. They shoot to kill. 

If you can pull this off, there's a nice paycheck in it for you.

-Twitch
rawKeys.headhunters_eliminateall_retrievestolen_:
Local crew decided to hit one of our convoys and steal our shit. They got away, but we aren't gonna let them celebrate for long. I want you to head out to ~mission(Location|Address) where they got a base, blast them into ash, and get our stuff back. 

Once you got the cargo, take it over to ~mission(Destination|Address) and we can all forget these assholes ever existed.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Asteroid_G:
Got word of crew that's been pulling jobs and building a rep for themselves. Since they've said they don't want anything to do with Headhunters, we're looking to break 'em apart before they become a problem. Their leader is some punk named ~mission(TargetName) and we figure if they met the wrong end of a bullet, the rest of them would break apart.

We're told you can find ~mission(TargetName|Last) around ~mission(Location|Address). Head over and take care of it.

They shouldn't pose much of a problem to a pro like you.

Stows out.
rawKeys.cfp_defend-criminals_desc_001:
We learned that ~mission(Location|Address) is under threat of attack by outlaws and has asked for assistance. We need someone to protect them and drive away the outlaws. 

Make sure you stay close after their initial attack. Too often, outlaws win fights just by sending more bodies than anyone can reasonably defend against, so make sure you fight off any reinforcements before leaving the area. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Intersec_DefendShip_Desc_Easy_001:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship 
Briefing: Require urgent assistance for an InterSec operative who is currently under fire at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

A group of outlaws had previously taken our operative captive with the intention of extracting sensitive information from them, but miraculously they were able to escape. Unfortunately, the pursuing outlaws now have them pinned down.

Due to the number of the ships assaulting them, we're offering additional compensation to accommodate the added danger. <EM4>Recruiting additional ships</EM4> to support you in this mission is highly advised.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractorâ€™s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
rawKeys.cfp_eliminateall_fromCFP_hh_M_desc_001:
We received an emergency comm from ~mission(Location|Address) reporting that they are currently under attack by a group of Headhunters. We know our presence in the system has upset the Headhunters, but it hardly excuses this unprovoked attack.

If available, please gather your gear and head out. Just understand that Headhunters are experienced fighters and will not back down easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Headhunters_EliminateAll_OLP_H_desc_001:
Surprise, surprise. Seems like not everyoneâ€™s happy that the Headhunters are making inroads in Stanton. One crew in particular has been hitting our people and then scurrying back to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Want you to go there and give â€˜em a taste of their own medicine. Removing these lickboots should send a pretty clear message about what happens if you screw with us. 


Stows out.
rawKeys.LingFamily_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descrip:
Hey,

Need a reliable contractor to help us out with a bit of a situation.

Our of our haulers has dropped out mid-contract and now our client's cargo is stuck in transit. Think they were trying to negotiate a better rate with us, but that's not how Ling does business. Anyway, they're done and we desperately need the shipment finished.

Petra and I have been working with this client for years now and have built up a good rapport. Be a shame to throw that all a way because of an unreliable hauler. Can you head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and collect the shipment? You'll need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Take the shipment to the freight elevator over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll get you paid as soon as. We'd really appreciate your help with this and I'm sure our client would too.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows itâ€™s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our clientâ€™s cargo. To ensure you arenâ€™t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
rawKeys.Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_H_desc_001:
Reports of a spike in drug overdoses around Stanton has security services worried. Seems like some two-bit crew is juicing their profits by cutting their stuff with toxic chemicals. Shutting down this crew and stopping the distribution of their drugs has become a top priority.

A Foxwell informant has revealed that part of this crew has currently set up shop at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Hiring a contractor to hustle over there and destroy whatever drugs theyâ€™ve got stashed before theyâ€™re spread across the system. Better be careful though, word is this crew is armed to the teeth and determined to profit off that poison no matter what.


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.cfp_sabotage_servers_M_HH_desc_001:
The Headhunters recently attacked one of our transports and were sadly able to get their hands on some secure data. Although the encryption on it is strong, its only a matter of time before they'll be able to access it.

Before that happens, we need you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all traces of the information from their servers.

You'd really be helping Citizens for Prosperity out if you can pull this off.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_M_desc_001:
Weâ€™ve been contracted to take care of a problem at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Thereâ€™s been a recent surge of activity in the area tied to the drug trade. It appears to be a well-run operation and thereâ€™s a growing concern that itâ€™ll expand wider if not stopped. Any chance youâ€™re available to make sure that doesnâ€™t happen?   

Job is pretty straightforward. Head to the site and destroy their stash of drugs. That way they wonâ€™t have the creds to expand their operations any further. I wouldnâ€™t expect them to make this easy on you though. Armed guards are regularly seen around the facility, so be sure youâ€™ve got enough gear to deal with them too. 


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

rawKeys.cfp_sabotage_VH_desc_001:
Citizens for Prosperity have been monitoring a very dangerous outlaw group at ~mission(Location|Address) and we believe that they are in midst of planning a major attack which could throw the whole system into upheaval.

In order to protect all the progress we've made here, we would like you to raid their compound and destroy all the servers housing their plans. 

This should at least provide us with enough of a reprieve for them to reconsider their offensive.

Thank you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.cfp_sabotage_servers_VH_XT_desc_001:

If you were able to destroy these servers on our behalf it would be a huge win for the security of the entire system.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.headhunters_bombingrun_VH_XT_desc_001:

Go to ~mission(Location|Address) and blow up the XenoThreat fuel reserves there. It'll really be helping me out of a tight spot.

-Stows
rawKeys.cfp_sabotage_servers_H_XT_desc_001:
We got a bit of a problem that I'm hoping you can solve for me. One of our informers has revealed that XenoThreat has been amassing data on Citizens for Prosperity operations throughout the system. 

This information, if used correctly, could put our people at serious risk. The best solution is for you to completely destroy the servers where the data is being stored at ~mission(Location|Address).

With their trove of information wiped out, it should give our people a fighting chance.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Hello. Can make fun change to gun if you want. Use kopion skin for pattern and little skull dangle. Very effective. Shoot much better.

All you need is bring me parts to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make. 

Bye.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_MiltSkull: Hello. Can do version of gun if you kopion soldier. Make material like soldier camouflage but with dead skull on front. Gun shoot better too.\n\nIf want, bring part to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make.
rawKeys.RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_003:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but to continue their efforts our scientists need materials that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar fangs</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have uncovered the existence of a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. 

Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is offering premium pay to anyone who can assist with collecting the fangs.  

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.deadsaints_recoveritem_M_Desc_001:
A couple of hours ago I was supposed to receive a shipment of gear from a pilot of mine. I donâ€™t like late, so I need you to head to their location and recover my stuff. Iâ€™ve got trackers on the packages so they should be easy enough to find.

My gut says the pilotâ€™s been ghosted. They knew how to handle a ship well, so the scavs that took them out must be decent. When you get my three packages back, take them to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4> for me and Iâ€™ll wire you the creds.

-Twitch
rawKeys.DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001:
If you want something done right, you gotta do it yourself. That's what they say, right? Wish I had the time for that, but I have a business to run.

Some of our goods have been mislaid and I need a contractor to put this right for me. Got some info that the guys at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> ghosted one of my gang and got their hands on our gear. I need you to grab the stuff, deal with anyone at the location and take it to the drop-off at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4> for me. Get it done and I'll sort out your payment.

-Twitch
rawKeys.Headhunters_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc:
Weâ€™ve been using the old Hathor <EM4>~mission(Location1|Address)</EM4> and <EM4>~mission(Location2|Address)</EM4> as stashes, but it turns out some over-eager nullbrains sniffed them out and are trying to boost our shit for their own.

Luckily, the goods are still there - for now. We need someone to visit that PAF and OLP, grab our stuff from the freight elevators, and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> where we should be able to keep it on ice. 

Hereâ€™s the list of what to grab. Donâ€™t care what order you do â€˜em in. Be sure to bring a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> at the very least. 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

Make sure youâ€™re ready to deal with whatever assholes you run across. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.
rawKeys.BitZeros_blackbox_E_Title_001: Getting To the Bottom of It
rawKeys.BitZeros_blackbox_E_Desc_001:
So we were expecting a pretty important package earlier today but turns out the pilot got ghosted and they ripped the tracking chip from it and got away. Pretty clever right? Not really, because they forgot to take the flight recorder too.

Get the blackbox from the wreck at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4>. Weâ€™ll send you the creds when youâ€™re done.

Oh and watch out for scavs, people are pretty desperate these days, even if it just some busted courier ship.

-Bit Zeros
rawKeys.deadsaints_recoveritem_VH_Desc_001:
I got a situation I need dealing with pronto. A rival crew has intercepted a major shipment of gear I was expecting and all hell is breaking loose. The pilotâ€™s ghosted, the shipâ€™s busted, and itâ€™s only a matter of time before they take my shit and leave. If youâ€™re up for cracking these assholes, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and get my five packages.

Headâ€™s up though, the pilot they ghosted was one of my best, so this crewâ€™s got to be seriously kitted out. Bring your finest mates with you and show the bastards no mercy. Understood?

When youâ€™re done, take the gear to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4> and Iâ€™ll make sure you get a serious cut of the takings.

-Twitch
rawKeys.HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descri:
Hereâ€™s the thing, I got a situation over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and need someone with a brain between their ears to sort it out for me. Former pilot of mine thought he could cut a deal with another gang and unsurprisingly it didnâ€™t work out for him. Now my cargo is sitting idle and being guarded by a whole bunch of nullbrains waiting for their hauler to come pick it up.

Need you to head there with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a strong crew to get my shit back before its gone for good.

Take it all to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and Iâ€™ll give you a generous cut of the takings.

Stows out.
rawKeys.Headhunters_EliminateSpecific_PAF_desc_0:
Canâ€™t believe how many criminals are crawling around this damn system. Guess weâ€™ll have to make some room for ourselves. 

Got a list of high-level leaders here. Nothing brings chaos and disorder to the existing gangs like a good decapitation attack. The next target is <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, who weâ€™ve tracked to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Feel like ghosting â€˜em?   

These old Hathor platform facilities are big and spread out. Doubt thereâ€™s a way to do this and not attract the attention of their foot soldiers. Ainâ€™t gonna be easy but sure sounds like fun.

- Stows
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_xenothreat_ert_desc:
Need you to move quick on this one. There's a XenoThreat lieutenant named ~mission(TargetName) who's popped up for air. Judge thinks this is a big chance to mess with XenoThreat's command by taking them out. I heard ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying around ~mission(Location|Address), so get there quick before they disappear again.

I'd bring some support, I doubt they'll go down without a fight. 

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_ChainElimAll_AttackGen_E_des:
Looking for some hitters to go drop some violence on some local dipshits who've been pulling jobs in the system against Headhunters. We tried reaching out to explain the error of their ways, but they shot our messenger, so now we go with option B.

You'll find them holed up near ~mission(Location|Address). Go there and repaint the walls with their blood.

Have fun.

Stows out.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Drake_Golem_Dec:
Universe need resources so Wikelo always respect people who dig. Good profession. If you starting and want boost to Golem ship. I can do. 

Bring. 

I make.
rawKeys.bitzeros_shipheist_M_desc_001:
You'd figure that if people were planning a big heist they wouldn't leave all the details laying around spectrum where just about anybody could hack them? 

But hey, their loss is your gain. Currently, a cargo-heavy ship is locked down in the hangar of an asteroid base. Only way to access it is via the stationâ€™s elevators. Once inside, youâ€™ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. Weâ€™ll happily sell you the coordinates, but the rest is up to you. 

Guess their loss will be our gain too.

57 65 65 76 69 6c
rawKeys.HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descri:
Just got word of an abandoned ship with a fat stack of cargo ripe for the pluckinâ€™. If youâ€™re interested, youâ€™ll need to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Word might have gotten around, so thereâ€™s probably some skags hanging around, but just ghost them and get the stash.

Bring the cargo to the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address) and Iâ€™ll get you your creds.

Make sure you got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> on you too, no idea how big or small that cargo is.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_eliminateall_xt_desc_001:
It's sad to say but we lost one of our outposts to XenoThreat. Appalling if you ask me, but that's why we're looking for someone who's got the time and ammunition to take it back.

If that's you, head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take it back.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_VH:
Word's come down through my bosses that we're settling old debts. I've got an open line on this old-time hitter named ~mission(TargetName) who's racked up a hefty kill list. We caught wind that they were hiding out with some people over at ~mission(Location|Address) who aren't the biggest fans of us, so they probably won't take kindly to you. ~mission(TargetName|Last) is the target here, but you might have to mix it up with them.

Again, whenever we've tried to take out ~mission(TargetName|Last), they've killed their killer. I feel like you'll fare better, but I'd bring backup if you got it.

Good luck.

-Stows
rawKeys.headhunters_bombingrun_VE_desc_001:
Headhunters didn't get to be what it is today by playing nice. We've tracked down the hideout of a bunch of scraggy upstarts that have been making inroads into our territory. Need you to send a message.

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and blow out of their fuel tanks. They'll think twice about muscling in on our operations when their ships are grounded.

-Stows out
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Guardian_Desc: This ship look like insect in the Protectorate. Fun look. Painful sting. Wikelo can make custom version for you if you want. Make enemies sting. Bye.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_GuardianQI_Desc: Insect ship again. This one help take down other ship but if you want it to take down better. Can make. See list and tell Wikelo. Bye.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_GuardianMX_Desc: You Humans enjoy strange letter combinations. It very funny. Guardian ship very useful but if you want even more useful, bring me things. I give you better ship. Look better. Act better.\n\nThank you. Bye.
rawKeys.cfp_sabotage_drugs_M_desc_001:
Citizens for Prosperity has been working hard to improve people's lives across the system, but an already difficult task becomes near impossible when drugs get involved. We've recently seen a dealer specifically targeting our most vulnerable and have experienced setbacks across the board. This needs to stop.

We would like you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and put a permanent end to their production line.

Do this and we can hopefully get our people back on track. 
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Intersec_DefendShip_Vanduul_Desc_Super_0:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: An operator working with InterSec is currently being attacked by Vanduul ships at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The likelihood of them surviving on their own is low, so weâ€™re looking for a contractor willing to provide combat support.  

Contractors accepting this mission should be well supplied and ready to face the Vanduul threat head-on. 

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractorâ€™s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
rawKeys.headhunters_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_00:

Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

- Stows out
