A distress call just came in from ~mission(Location|Address) claiming that a large Headhunter force has just attacked our outpost there. There have been multiple deaths and injuries from those who managed to flee the scene. We're looking for any available security personnel to head there and retake the outpost.

Witness accounts identified the attackers as elite Headhunter enforcers, so watch yourself out there and bring help if you can. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.headhunters_defendship_LRT_PA_desc_001:
You busy? A promising prospect was doing a special run for me but ran into trouble with the Peopleâ€™s Alliance around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. This oneâ€™s on me. Knew they werenâ€™t the best dogfighter but thought they could do this without running into any other ships. 

Told â€˜em to hold tight and do everything they can to stay alive until support gets there. Shouldnâ€™t be too much trouble for someone with your skillset.  

-Stows
rawKeys.headhunters_defendship_LRT_desc_001:
Just got word that a Headhunter over near ~mission(Location|Address) got roped into a fight and now they can't see it through. The idiot wants me to save their sorry ass.

Guess I'm a soft touch, because I'm actually going to pay you to do it for me. What do you say? Wanna save a moron's life?

-Stows
rawKeys.headhunters_defendship_VLRT_desc_001:
Seems we got some upstarts trying to muscle in our operations by hitting a Headhunter ship near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure how they expected to get away with it.

They need to learn the hard way that's not how things work in Pyro. You up for heading over there and teaching these bastards a lesson?

- Stows out
rawKeys.headhunters_defendship_MRT_desc_001:
One of my pilots wasn't thinking straight and got themselves mixed up in a heap of trouble over at ~mission(Location|Address). 

The real kicker is the fool has a full hold. Can't really afford to lose the stuff they're carrying, so I'd appreciate it if you could go bail them out for me. 

- Stows out
rawKeys.CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Title_V: Help Deal with Outlaw Hunting Party
rawKeys.CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_VE:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of ~mission(Location|Address). 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_HHAttack_M_desc_001:
We just received a frantic comm from ~mission(Location|Address) and are looking for any available combat specialists to help repel a Headhunter attack. There are still hostiles on site and there are reports of several casualties so we need this handled quickly.

I will provide all relevant data upon acceptance. Thank you for your assistance.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Headhunters_DefendLocation_H_Desc_001:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are coming under attack. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops.

- Stows
rawKeys.headhunters_defendship_VLRT_PA_desc_001:
Guess some folks just canâ€™t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how theyâ€™re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who theyâ€™re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.

If youâ€™re free, could you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show â€˜em how itâ€™s done?

-Stows
rawKeys.Foxwell_EliminateAll_Allies_desc_001:
Got word that outlaws are attempting to overrun <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Thereâ€™s local security forces there, but theyâ€™re struggling to stop that attack.

Need a contractor to hustle there and help take care of the aggressors. Bring plenty of gear, and be careful when engaging targets. Donâ€™t want to hear about any security team members getting caught in your crossfire.    


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_Hush: You want be hidden. Wikelo understand. Not ask questions why. But what do when you in snow? Wikelo have suit for that.\n\nWelcome.

Considering the state of things before we lost contact, I'm considering this a recovery mission. Multiple hostiles are expected at the site, so a skilled crew is crucial for the success of this operation. There will be a high volume of cargo to deal with, so a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> will be needed. 

Upon successful extraction of cargo, deliver to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we recommended that a client use a specific route to cross Nyx safely. Turns out it wasnâ€™t as secure as we assumed, because a group ambushed our clientâ€™s ship. We need to get this cleaned up ASAP. Are you available to help?

rawKeys.Eckhart_ShipAmbush_S_desc:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we sent a contractor after a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, who was leading a crew targeting the operations of an extremely important client. Unfortunately, it was a trap and we lost some good people. We canâ€™t let the target get away again, so weâ€™ve decided the best course of action is to give them a dose of their own medicine.  

Ambushing this target seems like the safest course of action, and weâ€™ve identified a good spot for such an attack. Thereâ€™s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that the target and their crew frequently fly by. You can power down your ship and hide there until youâ€™re ready to strike. This crew is ruthless and extremely skilled. Donâ€™t make the same mistake as the previous contractor and go this alone. It would be best for you to bring a few trusted friends to help handle this crew.    

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. Plus, weâ€™ll throw in a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor for taking care of this.

rawKeys.headhunters_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_Att:
Got a big one here. We need a team to head out to ~mission(Location|Address). Word is CFP are dug in at three different clusters in the area. Our judge wants them all cleared out. Seems one of their mercs, a real mean skag named ~mission(TargetName), is holed up at one of them. We want you to go there, clear them all out and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Get yourself a nice little payday in the process.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_cfp_mrt_desc_001:
CFP Security forces have been attacking locals and we're looking to balance the scales. Caught wind of one in particular named ~mission(TargetName|Last) who's been causing some damage and we need them taken out.

You can find them flying around ~mission(Location|Address). Go introduce yourself.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_ChainElimAll_Boss_XenoThreat:
These XenoThreat assholes are like aloprats. Every time you thing you wipe them out, they just pop back up again. They seem to be back to their usual shit and trying to put together something big. No idea what, but we've been cleared to stop it before it starts.

A group of XenoThreat biggies are supposedly meeting at ~mission(Location|Address) to plan or just rage or whatever it is they do, but we're gonna bust it up. Or you are.

Head over there and wipe out everyone you find. Sure enough I'm sure the biggies will jump into the fight. That's what they always do.

This'll be a tough one. As much as I hate XenoThreat, they're damn good in a fight, so watch yourself and bring help if you can.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateAll_XenoThreat_H_de:
One of our people stumbled across a group of XenoThreat hiding out over near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure if they're dug in or just passing through, but we want to hit them before they move.

Maybe bring some people if you got 'em because XenoThreat don't tend to go down easy. Get there and remind them who the power is in this system.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_E_desc_001:
Need someone to sweep ~mission(Location|Address). CFP security forces seized the outpost from a group of locals that'd been there for years. Beat the hell out of 'em from what I heard, so they came to Headhunters asking for revenge. 

Need it done fast and clean. 

Stows out.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_NonePistol: You need a good weapon, yes? Have one for you. Small but powerful. Like an extra spicy balalu pepper. Wikelo make this pistol look extra spicy too. You bring things I need and I do a trade.\n\nBye.
rawKeys.Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001:
Got some assholeâ€™s trying to push us out of the system. You up for pushing back?

See, there are some folks who really donâ€™t want us here, and have started sending out hunting parties of five to seven ships, often with a bigger gun ship, to places where weâ€™re building up our presence. Time for us to show that weâ€™re here to stay.  

Iâ€™ve strung together a few spots starting at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD where weâ€™re seeing the most hostile encounters. Need you to visit each one and scan to see if we can bait them into a fight.

Know this is going to be a hard one, so don't be cocky and try to go it alone. If I were you, I'd bring at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> onboard for support. To make it worth your while, I'm promising a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor that pulls it off. 

- Stows

Initial surveillance indicates the servers are within the facilityâ€™s <EM4>Energy Lab, located in the Research wing</EM4>. Weâ€™ve also picked up on a number of hostile forces, so be on alert.

rawKeys.RepairOxygenKiosk_DescriptionLong:
Hello Guests,

We have recently been alerted that one of our Oxygen Dispensers has suffered a technical error. As you know these kiosks are vital to ensure that you have plenty of oxygen handy while participating in our Work Release Program.

We are looking for any available guest to reset the kiosk. That should reconnect the kiosk to the network and resolve the issue. The first guest who's able to complete this task will not only be compensated with merits, but also with the satisfaction that they're making the workplace safer for other guests.

Thank you.
rawKeys.Highpoint_KillAnimals_MultiType_H_desc:
Native plants and animals near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> are on the verge of environmental collapse due to the dramatic population spikes of several invasive species. Weâ€™ve been contracted to dramatically reduce the current population of these species to help avoid an environmental collapse. We need a dedicated and highly skilled exterminator to carry out this contract.     

You can better acquaint yourself with the creatures in question by referencing <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
rawKeys.CFP_Delivery_Outpost_desc_001:
Hey,

Weâ€™ve got an opportunity for any haulers interested in lending a hand or two to Citizens for Prosperity.

Thereâ€™s a box that needs to be moved from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Shouldnâ€™t take long, if youâ€™re around the outpost and available. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.CFP_Delivery_Outpost_Multi_desc_001:
Hi,

Citizens for Prosperity needs help moving supplies around one of our outposts. The boxes need to be picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Doesnâ€™t sound too difficult, does it? Just make sure youâ€™re wearing a comfy pair of shoes. Also, to make your life easier, I'd bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.CFP_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.RAIN_intro_name_01: Interested in Building a Better Future?
rawKeys.RAIN_intro_desc_01:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Letâ€™s grow together,

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descriptio:
Looking for a hauler to pick up some cargo for me. Thing is, thereâ€™s a catch.

The cargoâ€™s in the back of an abandoned ship located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. As you may have figured, this ainâ€™t our cargo, but it sure as hell doesnâ€™t deserve to go to anyone else. Iâ€™ll be damned if those CFP assholes get their hands on it before we do.

Be lucky as hell if we were the first to know about this, but Iâ€™d wager thereâ€™s gonna be more ships swarming around there than flies on a kopian carcass. If you got some pals you can trust, bring them along and ghost those assholes. And donâ€™t forget your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> of course.

You manage to get that cargo and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>, I can get you a nice cut of the sale.

Stows out.
rawKeys.Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M2_desc:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
From the personnel files recovered at the Onyx Facility, we have now learned that Dr. Jorrit has recently visited the site and accessed files while there. The next step will be to follow this lead and try to learn exactly what Dr. Jorrit was doing in his old lab.

Contract Investigator Actions:

Additional Notes:
I've found a work around for the QT issue so you'll be able to travel directly to the site from now on.

Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
rawKeys.Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M3_desc:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update:
The files you found in Engineering confirm that Dr. Jorrit is actively pursuing something at the site, but it is still unclear what the doctor is up to. Iâ€™m hoping that if you can find the data he was accessing in Research it will provide further clarity.

Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Developmentâ€™s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASDâ€™s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research labâ€™s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.
rawKeys.Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M4_desc:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
The seismic data you extracted had some interesting revelations. My expert says she thinks that Jorrit might have been excavating down there. Hate to think what heâ€™s doing, but it's our job to find out. I think weâ€™re close to cracking this, so I want you to go back to Onyx and gather the Power Usage data. If we can track energy flow from the last couple months, a pattern should reveal itself. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>upload the Power Usage data</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll be sending you <EM4>10 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of the information we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.
rawKeys.Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P3M1_desc:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
All your digging around Onyx has paid off. Iâ€™ve been able to confirm that Jorrit has been operating an off-the-record lab in the facilityâ€™s Site-B in order to conduct an experiment he calls â€œProject Hyperion.â€ Iâ€™ll send his <EM4>lab notes to your mobiGlas journal</EM4> once youâ€™re underway, but the long and short of it is the bastard is trying to make Humans evolve or some nonsense like that.

The client wants the experimental data, so youâ€™re going back to Onyx and do everything needed to get Project Hyperion up and running. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Prep the experiment by collecting a <EM4>Reagent code from the Engineering wing</EM4> and a <EM4>Catalyst code from the Research wing</EM4>.

Once you have those, head down to the <EM4>Lab in Site-B</EM4> and <EM4>run the experiment</EM4> so you can <EM4>upload the results</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Since this is an active lab, there might be ASD security on-site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

rawKeys.BHG_Certification_Hard_Desc:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: ~mission(System) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: ~mission(Location)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As your standing in the community continues to grow, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Journeyman Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend High-Risk Targets (HRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with several escorts. The additional offensive and defensive capabilities make them difficult targets for all but the most skilled guild members.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a HRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> last seen at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
rawKeys.FTL_Courier_Stanton_Medium_Title_001: JR. LVL. COURIER NEEDED IN STANTON
rawKeys.FTL_Courier_Stanton_Medium_Desc_001:
AVAILABLE FTL CONTRACT
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS**
Junior-level courier needed for deliveries across the Stanton System.
Transportation must be provided by courier.
You will be <EM4>required to lift up to .25 SCU</EM4> in weight.
Couriers are responsible for the correct handling and safety of all packages charged to their care.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_01:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(SingleToMultiToken)  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_waste_de:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a bunch of comms this morning. Seems one of the local trash collectors' ship is busted and we're gonna be picking up the slack.

I got a bunch of trash (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_cfp_hrt_desc_001:
Need another CFP ship taken out. It belongs to ~mission(TargetName), who's been  driving locals out of their homes if they don't accept Citizens for Prosperity help. They're a real piece of work and we've been given the go-ahead to take them down.

Their ship was spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so head out there and do the deed.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_E_:
Looking for any hitters available for a quick gig. Over at ~mission(Location|Address), they're getting hit by some geniuses led by ~mission(TargetName). We've tussled against ~mission(TargetName|Last) in the past so it's no surprise they haven't wised up. 

We want you to head there and take them down. Kill whoever you like, but ~mission(TargetName|Last) should be your focus.

Stows out.
rawKeys.Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_E_desc_001:
Some folks will do anything for a few creds. Thereâ€™s a group of upstart outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that have decided to start manufacturing drugs. Turns out theyâ€™re not too good at it, or maybe a little too good. The junk theyâ€™re pumping out is stronger than the normal stuff and a real danger to anyone who uses it. 

Weâ€™ve been hired to knock out their operation and destroy whatever drugs stashes are on site. Armed guards are protecting the place, but they donâ€™t seem too skilled. Our surveillance teams observed one of them almost shoot himself in the foot. Canâ€™t say for certain, but odds are they wonâ€™t give a pro like you too many problems.  


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.headhunters_sabotage_generators_multi_M_:
Got a few scavs that have rooted themselves into ~mission(Location|Address). We have our own plans there and need the place cleared out. 

That's why I want you to ho and turn off their power. Let's see if that doesn't cause these rats to abandon the place for good.

-Stows
rawKeys.Covalex_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description:
Hi, it's El.

Need a hauler for a job ASAP. One of our contractors had a "personal emergency" and had to ditch their ship and it seems like they're not coming back. Not ideal, really.

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
rawKeys.headhunters_maintenance_local_M_desc_001:
Sending a call out to anyone nearby. Got a pretty heavy work order for one of our outposts at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Sounds like we need <EM4>six fuses</EM4> fixed. You'll also need a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC to patch up about five pipes</EM4> to stop the place from falling apart.

If you bring all the shit needed to patch them up, we'll pay you out.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>â€œGuide to Maintenanceâ€</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_maintenance_local_H_desc_001:
Down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, the place got utterly smashed in a storm and needs some serious patchwork.

If anyone out there has a <EM4>bunch of fuses</EM4> (I hear <EM4>six</EM4> should be plenty), a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC cans to deal with eight or so messed up pipes</EM4>, we'll hook you up with some creds to do the fix.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>â€œGuide to Maintenanceâ€</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
rawKeys.Eckhart_ShipAmbush_M_desc:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Need someone to take out a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and deal with the escort ships protecting it. Theyâ€™ve already interfered with several of our ongoing operations and have become a real problem across several of Eckhart Security cases. Not sure what their endgame is, but it wonâ€™t matter once you deal with them.

Weâ€™ve let slip that we will be working a job over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> which should serve as bait to draw them out. If youâ€™re available, the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escorts should be passing through soon.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The main contractor will also receive a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.BitZeros_blackbox_H_Desc_001:
Donâ€™t know if youâ€™ve heard, but thereâ€™s a bunch of ships over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> surrounding a burnt-out ship. You curious why? I know we are.
Think you can get in that wreck, grab the blackbox, and get out? Weâ€™ll pay you for it.

Based on the number of sketchy ships in the area, you should bring some friends with to watch your ass, unless youâ€™re some crazy solo act, but weâ€™d prefer if you actually survived this so you can drop off the blackbox at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4> for us. 

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros

rawKeys.headhunters_defendship_multi_SRT_PA_desc:

Here's the deal. Some of those mercs that CFP hired as security went and shot up some Headhunters that were just moving through the system. They weren't even doing anything, just flying.

Anyway, we tracked them back to ~mission(Location|Address) and want to dish out some payback. Grab your gear and be our weapon, we'll make it worth your while.

- Stows
rawKeys.Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001:
Iâ€™ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we canâ€™t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. rawKeys.civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_001:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. ~mission(DescriptionSetup).

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
~mission(GiftSender|First)
rawKeys.DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio:

Ghost them and bring my cargo back to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and Iâ€™ll make sure youâ€™re seriously compâ€™d for this.

-Twitch

rawKeys.BHG_Certification_Super_Desc:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: ~mission(System) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Extreme
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: ~mission(Location)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As acknowledgment of your expertise in the craft, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Master Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Extreme-Risk Targets (ERT). These are criminals who travel in sub-capital ships with heavy escorts. This class of bounty only gets assigned to the most experienced of trackers.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend an ERT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> last seen at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
rawKeys.Covalex_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description:

The order says the hauler was using a ship that could carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you have the same. A <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> is a must for this one too.

That cargo needs to be delivered yesterday, so as soon as you've got it take it to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll get your payment sorted for you.

We've received word that a devastating storm hit <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> which caused some damage to the structures. Our technician on site is still trying to figure out what they can fix but they canâ€™t get everything. If you happen to be in the area, please read this.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for a qualified mechanic to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> with the required supplies and perform some repairs.

As it stands, youâ€™ll need <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair five pipes or so.</EM4> That should help us get the outpost functional again. We'll compensate you for your time and materials.

rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Starlift_Max_Desc: If you want to move many things. Hercules ship, very good for that. Wikelo even know souli back in Protectorate that started to use. Very big. Wikelo can give you similar version if you get what Wikelo need. Look at list and tell me.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Wolf_Unique_Desc: You have been good trade partner for Wikelo. Offer you this very special Wolf mod. Make trade even better - Bring me what I want and I give you the special Wolf AND Antium Armor AND a VOLT LMG. Very good deal for my very good customer.
rawKeys.vaughn_searchbody_space_M_Desc_001:
Whilst we pride ourselves on our efficiency and general cleanliness when it comes to our work, sometimes our contractors can get a little carried away themselves. Circumstances surrounding a former contractorâ€™s death, and more importantly, the target, are somewhat unclear to us.

Weâ€™ll need you to travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and locate <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>â€™s body so we can deliver clear confirmation to our client. As for the former contractorâ€¦ you neednâ€™t concern yourself with them. Arrangements for disposal have already been made.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_M_desc:
Need an available trigger to take down a target in a CFP outpost. They're a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). Old school merc filled with lead-pipe cruelty. 

Heard they're posted over at ~mission(Location|Address). Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Asteroid_G:
Need someone taken care of. They're holed up near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure if you care who they are, but their name's ~mission(TargetName). Not much to tell, local thug who killed someone who was connected.

They've been on the run, so they're gonna be skittish. I'd approach with caution.

Stows out.
rawKeys.cfp_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_001:
Hi, we need to move some cargo across the system and were wondering if you could help. I know this is outside your usual purview, but I'm low on options. This would also be a great way to show your committed to Citizens for Prosperity's greater mission here.

If you head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, there should be some cargo accessible via a freight elevator that we'll need you to take to another freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Only thing to call out is that your ship must be able to handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. To make your life easier, be sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. Otherwise, it should be a simple run. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.headhunters_eliminateall_base_Generic_E_:
So here's the deal, we got some small time dirtbags who think they're hotshots running out of a base near ~mission(Location|Address). I don't know what toxic shit they're drinking but they thought it'd be a good idea to step to some Headhunter Clips. Killed one, injured three more. So I'm looking to send someone there to blast their ambition right out of their skulls.

Head over and get it done. You'll get a nice bump of creds for it.

- Stows
rawKeys.cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_GenAttack_M:
The outlaw presence here has become much bolder of late and a lot of people are getting hurt. We've recently lost several clusters around ~mission(Location|Address). While we don't like to have to resort to violence, the board has acknowledged that these locations are crucial to establishing stability in the system and authorized the use of a security detail to retake them.

We're also aware that the embedded hostiles are being led by ~mission(TargetName) who's had a history of attacking CFP interests. The board would like ~mission(TargetName|Last) dealt with to prevent future attacks.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.RAIN_collectresources_single_OLP_desc_01:
To all available contractors,

Our research team at at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is working tirelessly on solving the current â€˜Regen Crisisâ€™ and addressing the issue of unstable imprints. Their work has produced promising results, but a lack of a key resource is impeding their ability to run further experiments. 

Weâ€™ve received word from our supplier that increased demand combined with lower mining yields means that we wonâ€™t receive our scheduled shipment for another few months. Our research team canâ€™t wait that long, and weâ€™re hoping you can help.      

The resource is hard to come by, but we have it on good authority that the old Hathor mining facilities were built in areas with a high concentration of the ore. Since Hathor went defunct not long after establishing their operations in- system, thereâ€™s a good chance that activating one of these mining lasers could provide you with what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_M_:
Got a crew that's been hitting Headhunter ships lately. Their leader's a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). We've tracked them to  ~mission(Location|Address), so we're looking for someone to put them down for good.

This group likes to fight, but shouldn't be a problem for someone like you. 

Get over there and get it done.

Stows out.
rawKeys.CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_H_:
A criminal fleet has taken up root in a sector that Citizens For Prosperity is trying to develop and all forward progress has stopped thanks to their violent actions. It is imperative to a long term goals that we find a way to neutralize this fleet before that cause any further damage.

You and your most trusted support ships will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Medium_001:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: Seemingly unsatisfied with their takings in Nyx, an outlaw group lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a major strike against the UEE. This cannot be allowed to come to pass.

Thanks to the work of our Intelligence team, we've been able to track them down to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Head there as soon as you can and engage before they have a chance to leave the system. Based on our strategic analysis, we recommend a <EM4>well-armed and skilled fleet</EM4> will be necessary for the successful completion of this mission.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractorâ€™s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
rawKeys.Intersec_KillShip_Vanduul_Desc_VeryHard_:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec is in need of a highly skilled combat pilot who can locate and neutralize a dangerous Vanduul target.

An operator of ours has identified a Vanduul ship flying within the vicinity of <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We've been given strict instructions to eliminate any Vanduul spotted on the fringes of UEE space, for fear of encroachment into the Empire's territory.

Bring a <EM4>small fleet of competent pilots</EM4> with you to engage and neutralize the target.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractorâ€™s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
rawKeys.Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Intro_001:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been hired to combat the rising number of outlaws using Nyx as a staging ground for their operations, with the intention of attacking neighboring UEE systems.

As a preventative measure, we require you to travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and eliminate the ringleader <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> to deter their planned attack on Stanton. They and their crew are highly dangerous and you are <EM4>advised  to bring a wingman</EM4> for support.

Contractors who can prove themselves reliable and competent in executing operations will be eligible for future missions with InterSec.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin

Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP38100

Hockrow Agency is looking for new contractors with a strong stomach and familiarity with dangerous situations to handle the legwork of an active missing persons investigation.

rawKeys.headhunters_bombingrun_E_desc_001:
Some competition has taken root at ~mission(Location|Address) and they've really been gumming up the works for our operations in the area.

Now part of me sees some potential in the upstarts so I'm hoping to bring them into fold, but at the same time, I can't really afford to have them flying around causing trouble.

Instead, I want you to go and blow up their fuel tanks. That should keep them grounded long enough for me to talk some sense into their thick heads.

-Stows out

I have a very specific task that requires my best people. 

Something unusual seems to have occurred over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. One of our contractors seems to have gone rogue after completing their assignment, refusing to communicate with us, and indiscriminately attacking those they come across. Now, I have other methods for dealing with renegade assets but our client still requires confirmation of the original targetâ€™s death which we are unable to provide due to this pilotâ€™s presence.

I need you to head to the location and identify that <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> is well and truly dead, preferably without being obliterated by this former, disgruntled contractor. As a fair warning, they were one of our most thorough, and ruthless employees, so extreme caution is advised. You will want to bring your most competent of allies to support you with this. 

Sincerely,

Vaughn

rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Nox_Desc: Wikelo know many Xi'an. Talk slow but very interesting if you have patience. This is very fast little thing to get you across planet. Wikelo made a few tweaks to make it zippier. If you want, Wikelo will make for you. Bye.
rawKeys.RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_002:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are stopping at nothing to halt the ongoing regeneration crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need a rare resource that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar pearls</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have found a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is prepared to generously compensate anyone who can assist with gathering the pearls. 

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

rawKeys.headhunters_killship_cfp_vhrt_desc_001:

Although ~mission(TargetName|Last) might have forgotten, the Headhunters remember their work with a merc company a few years ago that lead to the deaths of five brothers and sisters. rawKeys.northrock_bounty_prisoner_desc_intro:
Hey There,

My name is Braden Corchado and I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system. I may have reached out already, but we try to make it a point of approaching anyone who meets our high standards and encouraging them to complete a pro tem contract. 

You can't do much better than become a Northrock contractor. We have a solid reputation for offering challenging and interesting work at a higher rate of pay then many of our competitors in system. 

Now, to get approved, you will need to apprehend one ~mission(TargetName). They have recently escaped from the detention center and your job will be to track them down before they can disappear completely off the grid. 

A little hint is that it's safe to assume that the target is going to go try to clear their record. I recommend triangulating your search between the detention center they escaped from and locations where they can hack into the record system.

Get this done and we'll see about getting you more work.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

rawKeys.headhunters_sabotage_servers_VH_XT_desc_:

To add insult to injury, the bastard gave XenoThreat a bunch of our intel. I have some other folks tracking the traitor down, but I need you to take care of wiping out the stolen data for me. It's being kept on servers at ~mission(Location|Address).

Vaughn
rawKeys.shubin_rockcracker_solo_desc_01:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*: </EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>exclusive mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to only you and your crew. Your team will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that while we guarantee that these coordinates will be exclusive to you, we cannot assure that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may not discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
rawKeys.shubin_rockcracker_pvp_desc_01:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS: 
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>shared mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to you and your crew. (Remember, any other interested parties who purchase the mining rights will get access to the station as well.) Your crew will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that since this is a shared contract we are able to offer these mining rights at a reduced prices, but the resources in the asteroid will be available on a <EM4>first come, first serve</EM4> basis with any other mining crews at the site. Also, there is also a chance that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

Well, they said it in a more colorful way than that. All Iâ€™ll say is that I donâ€™t want to hear what theyâ€™ll say to me if they donâ€™t survive and are forced to regen.

rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_ARGO_Raft_Desc: RAFT is very useful. Wikelo take it and make it very very useful. Do work and make you happy. You want? Bring items to Wikelo for trade.
rawKeys.cfp_eliminateall_hh_E_desc_001:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for security personnel to take a former CFP outpost that's currently serving as a hideout for Headhunters to launch attacks throughout the system. 

Located near ~mission(Location|Address), reclaiming this outpost will allow CFP to provide greater support to local efforts to build stability.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.cfp_eliminateall_XT_E_desc_001:
Despite our efforts to promote non-violence, local outlaw groups continue to attack our organization. XenoThreat recently assaulted ~mission(Location|Address) and chased out our volunteers that had been working there.

We're looking to enlist combat personnel to retake the outpost. Ideally we could work something out to encourage them to move on, but XenoThreat quickly resorts to violence to solve all their issues so there will undoubtedly be a fight.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_VH:
Citizens for Prosperity's board just authorized funds to hire security personnel to retake several clusters near ~mission(Location|Address) that have since fallen into the hands of the Headhunters. While we tried to just accept the loss, it's become apparent that they are crucial to our ongoing operations in the system.

You'll need to clear out each of the locations that will be provided but more importantly, you'll also need to take out ~mission(TargetName), who's in charge of the hostiles on site.

These Headhunters are heavily embedded and have a history of violence, so you should prepare accordingly. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_XTAttack_H_:
Looking for any available security personnel to reclaim several clusters previously lost to XenoThreat aggressors. Located near ~mission(Location|Address), they had been seized in brutal attacks led by ~mission(TargetName), a notorious XenoThreat lieutenant.

We're looking to take these clusters back so we can reestablish operations and continue our good work. You'll need to clear all the hostiles still on-site as well as ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Just a reminder, that XenoThreat are highly trained and quick to fight, so prepare accordingly.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

rawKeys.Covalex_RecoverCargo_Super_Description:
Hey,

Only looking for contractors who are the best of the best for this one. One of our most valued clients is expecting an incredibly important shipment which is now seriously overdue.

Here at Covalex, we pride ourselves on treating all of our clients equally, offering outstanding levels of service regardless of what we're delivering. That being said, if we lose this contract someone's gonna be in hot water and I really can't afford for that person to be me.

The tracker is reporting that the last contractor's ship is over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Don't take any chances with this one, you'll need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to collect it all.

Deliver the shipment to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we can put this whole mess behind us. And you'll make a sizeable heap of credits in the process. Not bad, right?

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
rawKeys.CFP_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description:
A Citizens for Prosperity ship has been ambushed by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and we need a skilled pilot to help them out.

We lost contact with them mid comms, but it sounded like they were taking heavy fire. It may be too late for them, but the vital supplies they were carrying could still be put to good use. Fly over there, take out any hostiles, and recover the shipment. You'll need a ship that can support <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the supplies onto your ship.

Unfortunately, a Valakkar infestation is creating serious problems for not only the stations' infrastructure, but also for the chances of them being brought back online one day. Due to Valakkar's status as an invasive species, we have decided that culling them is the only viable option.

Best,
 
Wanda Werkheiser

Contract Manager

rawKeys.HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_H_desc_001:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says theyâ€™re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

Weâ€™ve IDâ€™d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since itâ€™s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, itâ€™s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_eliminateall_outpost_desc_01:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what weâ€™re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we couldâ€™ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from ~mission(Location|Address). We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. Weâ€™ll send your payment once everyoneâ€™s taken care of.

- Stows out.
rawKeys.EckhartSecurity_EliminateAll_storm_shut_:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got an emergency request from Associated Science & Development for any available operators to report to ~mission(Location) and deal with some hostiles who have overtaken one of their facilities. 

Once on site, you will need to engage and eliminate any hostile elements. ASD has indicated that this facility provides shuttle services to one of their embedded research centers but were very clear that you are not authorized to travel there. Trespassers will be shot and you will be no exception, so stick to the prescribed AO.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti:
Hi,

Got a relatively straightforward one for you if you're interested.

One of our pilot ignored a maintenance warning and sure enough, a couple of hours later their ship broke down over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They're on their way back to the office now but we could do with a reliable hauler whose got a ship big enough to transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to complete the haul for us.

Think you could help us out? You just need to pick up the stranded shipment and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  And I probably don't have to say this, but a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> would probably be handy to have along.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows itâ€™s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our clientâ€™s cargo. To ensure you arenâ€™t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
rawKeys.cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_desc_001:
A Citizens for Prosperity convoy on a resupply run dropped a distress beacon near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Theyâ€™re not answering any comms, so I assume the situation is serious. That convoy has some skilled pilots, so if theyâ€™re not responding then they definitely need the help.

Weâ€™ll compensate you to support that convoy.  

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Headhunters_DefendLocation_S_Desc_001:
Our crew at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> needs help. Enemy ships are swarming the area and attacking anything and everything they can find. Thatâ€™d be bad enough as is, but this site has some absolutely crucial gear and personnel that we canâ€™t have destroyed or compromised. 

Considering the size and scale of the attack, youâ€™re gonna need a fully supplied ship and some reliable wingmen. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and Iâ€™ll send you specifics on where youâ€™re needed most.

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow
rawKeys.cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_H_:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available security operatives to retake several former CFP installations near ~mission(Location|Address) from Headhunter control. These clusters were violently taken from us by ~mission(TargetName) and resulted in the deaths of many volunteers.

Bringing these outposts back under our control will help provide more stability to the system. Reports indicate that ~mission(TargetName|Last) tends to hide behind their rank and file, so they will likely appear once you've cleared out most of the hostiles.

XenoThreat are trained and motivated so they will not give up easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti:
You got a ship and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>? Good. Iâ€™ve got work for you.

Donâ€™t know how they knew we were coming, but one of my haulers got jumped over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The pilotâ€™s gone silent so I assume theyâ€™ve been ghosted, but the cargo tracker is stationary for now.

Expect the bastards who took out my pilot to still be around, so bring backup. Get the cargo and get out, donâ€™t need to risk anymore good haulers on this mess.

Get the goods to the freight elevator to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and Iâ€™ll send your payment.

-Twitch
rawKeys.Kaboos_Mission_Description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec needs your services once again.

The intel you previously gathered has been invaluable in identifying several prominent buyers of the illegally-obtained Vanduul parts. However, since then the Shattered Blade have continued their operations and the UEE is requesting that we <EM4>update our intel.</EM4>

We believe more information can be retrieved from the storage facilities located at the old <EM4>QV Logistics station.</EM4>

The operation parameters havenâ€™t changed since your last mission: find the <EM4>encrypted data</EM4> and use the <EM4>decryption key</EM4> to decipher and upload the list to us. The Shattered Blade will have reinforced the area since the last time, so expect resistance.

Good luck. Weâ€™ll be in touch.


Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractorâ€™s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
rawKeys.TarPits_TimedSalvage_Desc_01:
Weâ€™ve got our eye on a ~mission(ship) near ~mission(location) thatâ€™s ripe for salvaging. Weâ€™re too busy to snag it ourselves, so why not spread the wealth, right?

If you send us some credits, weâ€™ll send you the shipâ€™s exact coordinates. Donâ€™t take too long to think it over, though. Youâ€™ve probably got about ~mission(timer) minutes until security gets there to check out the wreck. Could be more, could be less.

You could either tow it somewhere else first, or you could try to scrap what you can onsite before security shows. Donâ€™t care which as long as you get it taken care of. And once you've salvaged everything you want, just go ahead and abandon this contract to clear your map. Helps keep everything nice and tidy.
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_ToPyro_Dange:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Have a run here that could become a lucrative regular thing if we can pull it off.  Thisâ€™ll take you into Pyro, so youâ€™ll have to be ready to tangle with some of the locals. 

Youâ€™ll need to grab the stuff from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, make the jump to Pyro, and then get to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

All you need to do is bring a ship with space for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and be ready to do some damage if someone picks a fight with you.
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_FromPyro_Dan:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Guess some companies see danger when offered a run in Pyro. We see profits. Got one here that starts in the system at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and then goes to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

The client warned us that outlaws in Pyro regularly target this run, which has scared other hauling concerns. Be sure your ship is all geared up and can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. And don't forget to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_LuxuryGoods_:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a contract from a major client who needs a skilled pilot to move a large load of luxury items from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

You'll need room for at least <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> in your hold. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded. 

And as a fair warning, the things you'll be carrying are pricey enough that you might attract some unwanted attention. <EM4>Be ready to defend yourself</EM4> if you can't evade.
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_Rev:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind needs an experienced pilot to transport a large shipment of raw revenant tree pollen from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

This might seems self-evident, but the rep from CFP asked us to assure you that it's okay under UEE law to transport revenant tree pollen as long as it hasn't been processed. 

Be sure that your ship can carry up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> before you accept the contract. And buy a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> if you don't have one already to make loading and unloading as painless as possible.
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

CFP has an urgent request for a pilot with combat experience. A few of their settlements are under immediate threat and may soon be under attack, so they need supplies ASAP. 

If you're confident that you can navigate a potential combat zone, please head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, grab the cargo, and bring it to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

You'll need enough room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded.

Keep in mind that it's always best to run if someone tries to ambush you. But if you get cornered, don't hesitate to defend yourself.
rawKeys.RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_Ran:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a request from a farmer in Pyro for specialized agricultural supplies - namely, ranta dung. Apparently, normal fertilizers aren't cutting it. They've put in orders from multiple distributors and need someone to bring everything back to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Here are all the places you can collect the dung:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

 ~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

The client says your ship needs to be able to carry at least <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. Don't forget to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Meteor_Desc: Meteor big. It heavy. Have many guns. But Wikelo figure out way to make even better. You have things I will take to do.\n\nThat is all.
rawKeys.roughready_salvage_M_title_001: Salvage Wrecked Ships on the Drift
rawKeys.roughready_salvage_M_desc_001:
Got word thereâ€™s a few ships near ~mission(Location|Address) just floating all by their lonesome. Itâ€™s good salvage, but none of our crews have the time right now. We figured to give you first snap at it.

If you want the coords, weâ€™ll sell them to you for a price. Then youâ€™re free to pick the wreck as clean as you like and sell it all for a tidy profit. Now, you might run into some trouble out there from rival scavs, but Iâ€™m sure it wonâ€™t be anything you canâ€™t handle.

- Smokey
rawKeys.Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Levs: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)

Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent small-scale order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) and Construction Materials by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships. Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

rawKeys.Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. Iâ€™ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but Iâ€™ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Stows out.
rawKeys.Headhunters_DefendLocation_M_Desc_001:
Our airspace around <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> has been compromised. Enemy ships are threatening the base and any of our ships in the area. Gotta put a stop to this immediately, so get your shit in order and get over there. Just get going and Iâ€™ll update you with any relevant info on where youâ€™re needed. 
 
If you need any extra motivation, Iâ€™m adding a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

- Stows
