rawKeys.Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001:
Headhunters want some intel on whatâ€™s happening around territory. Weâ€™ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good olâ€™ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then weâ€™ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows
rawKeys.EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Client has requested a discreet contractor to infiltrate an ASD research site, locate a group of servers, and destroy the information stored on them permanently.

The client was able to share the location of the servers within the facility: the <EM4>Control Center in the Engineering wing</EM4>. The site has officially been shuttered, but there still may be hostile forces there. Be on your guard.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.cfp_defendship_Intro_Desc_001:
Citizens for Prosperity is in need of pilots with dogfighting experience. If youâ€™re looking to put your skills to the test, I have a mission here for you to try. 

A civilian ship has requested combat support near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Head there and show us that you have the skills to excel in these types of missions and weâ€™ll put you to good use.  

Please be aware. This mission is not a training exercise. This is a real encounter, so please do your best to save the ship in distress. 

Good Luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc_001:
Got an opportunity for someone eager to show off their flying skills. Headhunters have been running afoul of this numbrain flying a<EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and weâ€™re gonna put a stop to it once and for all.

Youâ€™re gonna help us set a trap for them. See, thereâ€™s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. 

Head there, hide inside the cloud by powering down your ship, and attack the asshole as soon as you see â€˜em and other single-seaters dumb enough to fly with them. Itâ€™ll be all you for that first hit, but weâ€™ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And in honor of this being your first surprise attack for us, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.
rawKeys.Eckhart_ShipAmbush_VE_desc:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients has been the victim of consistent harassment so the time has come to send a clear cease-and-desist message by taking out their prized <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>.  The lowlife in question follows a fairly predictable routine making them susceptible to an ambush. Weâ€™ve identified <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> as the ideal spot. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting. 

By the way, the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> often flies alone but is sometimes joined by a friend in a single-seat ship. Neither should give you too much trouble, but we have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. Thereâ€™s a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_HeavyUtil: You need utility suit. Good for work. If you like, Wikelo can make shinier. Look real good. See what Wikelo need and bring.
rawKeys.cfp_defendship_MRT_desc_001:
A Citizens for Prosperity affiliated ship was attempting to deliver some supplies to ~mission(Location|Address) when they were attacked by the recipients who didn't want to pay for their purchase and chose violence instead.

I'll instruct our traders to be more careful about who they deal with in the future, but for now, I would really appreciate you lending them a hand in fighting off these attackers. 

Appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_E_desc:
My boss is looking for an available hitter. Headhunters are looking to retake ~mission(Location|Address). The CFP Mercs there have been digging in for a long fight. Look, we don't want to kill anyone we don't have to, so we're looking into other options.

Security there's being run by ~mission(TargetName) and my Judge thinks that if they're taken out, the rest'll scatter. Shedding a little blood's better than a lot, right?

-Stows
rawKeys.Headhunters_EliminateAll_PAF_H_desc_001:
Wordâ€™s gotten out that weâ€™re expanding into Stanton and a local crew has hit a few of our safe houses. We managed to track the bastards back to some old Hathor mining site. 

You up for showing them how the Headhunters handle things? If so, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show them that we mean business. 

 
- Stows
rawKeys.headhunters_sabotage_generators_VE_desc_: This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at ~mission(Location|Address) who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.\n\n-Stows out
rawKeys.Headhunters_SabotageRelays_CFP_001_Desc:
CFP think theyâ€™re safe over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> but we got big plans for them. Youâ€™re gonna pave the way for us by heading there and shutting down their comm towers.

There should be a <EM4>control terminal at the top</EM4> that you can use to shut the tower down. You get that sorted and they wonâ€™t be able to call for backup. Then we can show those skags who this system belongs to.

Most outposts use the same system, so thisâ€™ll come in handy next time you want to make sure reinforcements donâ€™t mess with you.


Stows out.
rawKeys.CFP_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc:
Citizens for Prosperity are eager to help the people of Pyro, and it starts with freeing them from the grasp of XenoThreat.

Weâ€™re preparing a team to infiltrate one of their outposts, but we need someone to go in ahead to take out their communication towers first. Once those towers are offline, they wonâ€™t be able to call for reinforcements and we can proceed with our plan.

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and find the towers. At the <EM4>top is a control panel</EM4> that can be used to disable them.

Also, itâ€™s worth noting that most outposts use a similar system, so youâ€™ll know how to disable the comms towers rather than risk fighting reinforcement dropships when youâ€™re doing other jobs.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
rawKeys.Headhunters_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc:
Weâ€™re making a play to hit some XenoThreat assholes where it hurts but need to be smart about it. Thatâ€™s why weâ€™re sending you in first to take out their comm towers so they canâ€™t call for backup. You do that and we can be in and out before they know it.

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and climb the comm towers there. Should be a <EM4>control panel at the top</EM4> you can use to switch them off.

In fact, same goes for most other outposts. Rather than having to deal with reinforcements, you can just turn off the comm towers. But hey, if you wanna ring the bell to ghost a few more Xenothreat I ainâ€™t complaining.


Stows out.
rawKeys.HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_E_desc_001:
Any interest in taking out a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> for us? 

Shouldnâ€™t be too much trouble. Weâ€™ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and youâ€™ll get a good jump on â€˜em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. Weâ€™ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_gen_lrt_desc_001:
Got another scumbag who needs their ticket punched. ~mission(TargetName) is just a low level thug who doesn't seem to learn. We've warned them to either throw in with us or move system, but they don't seem to be listening so we're out of patience.

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and you should find ~mission(TargetName|Last) flying around. 

Stows out.
rawKeys.Covalex_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description:
Hiya,

I've got a client who's been messaging me all morning about a shipment they were supposed to receive and when I checked up on the cargo it turns out that it's sitting completely still in the middle of space.

This is obviously bad for a number of reasons, and not just because I had to spend 20 minutes getting yelled at. Can you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and see what happened? The original contract called for a ship that could carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you've got that and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

Once you've got the cargo, can you make sure it's delivered to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>? Thanks a bunch.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
rawKeys.Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Nyx_M_Plane:
CONTRACT: Mining Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
One of our prospecting teams recently confirmed that the asteroids which house QV Breaker Stations throughout Nyx's Keeger Belt contain a rare ore type, Sadaryx.

However, owing to the difficulty in access these stations and the inherent risks involved, we are seeking external mining crews to handle the extraction.

We do not have a confirmed location of where the Sadaryx deposits are located within the station, but would recommend starting with the cave sections where minerals naturally form. If you get really lucky, you may even find some crystals in storage that were mined by the old QV work crews.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
Your crew will need to gain access to a <EM4>QV Breaker Station</EM4>, collect the required <EM4> Sadaryx ore</EM4>, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This will require a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4> and a basic understanding of hand mining.

Our prospecting teams have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws. Caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

rawKeys.CFP_RecoverCargo_Super_Description:

Our pilot was transporting some vital cargo when they were targeted by a group of outlaws. Under no circumstances can we allow them to get their hands on the cargo.

With the size of the hostile force who attacked, you won't be able to do this on your own, you'll need to bring a skilled crew with you to  <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> in order to  take out these outlaws and get the cargo back. Make sure at least one of you has a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

If by some miracle you can get that cargo back, take it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Lima Endicott

We got eyes on a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> thatâ€™s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

Stows out.

-Stows out

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher

We are currently looking for any qualified and available security operatives to head out to ~mission(Location|Address) and reclaim a CFP installation that had been taken by Headhunters.

Citizens for Prosperity

Stows out.

rawKeys.headhunters_killship_asteroid_rank0_desc:

We asked for a cut of their profits as a licensing tax to continue operating. When ~mission(TargetName|Last) responded, they were very disrespectful.

We've tracked their ship to ~mission(Location|Address) and need them taken out. You should know, they're being smart and sticking close to some allies so they won't be alone.

Looking for anyone with an itchy trigger finger. We're looking to move against some CFP at  ~mission(Location|Address) and take it for ourselves. You gotta play this smart though. There are a bunch of satellite outposts around the main one and all of 'em got security, so you should take out each of these before you take the main base.

But hey, if you wanna jump right in the deep end and fight off all the reinforcements, that's on you. As long as you get it done.

Stows out.
rawKeys.Eckhart_ShipAmbush_E_desc:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client of ours has been receiving anonymous threats in an attempt to blackmail them, and after a bit of leg work on our part, weâ€™ve managed to trace it back to an individual who pilots a particular <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. The client wants us to take care of this blackmailer before they have a chance to make good. 

Based on our assessment, the target shouldnâ€™t be too difficult to handle. They fly by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> on the regular, which has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> thatâ€™s an ideal spot to power down your ship and lie in wait. Sometimes the target is alone but they often travel with other single-seat ships as protection. Best be strategic when you launch your ambush or the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> could have a chance to get away. We donâ€™t want to lose this one. Weâ€™ll alert other contractors in the area of the ambush so they can come help once it pops off.     

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client has also added a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.BitZeros_blackbox_M_Title_001: Too Smart For Our Own Good
rawKeys.BitZeros_blackbox_M_Desc_001:
We were a little too smart with this one and itâ€™s kinda backfired. Sometimes you gotta dream big, you know? Anyway. we were looking to move some encrypted data to one of our data havens and decided to hide it in a shipâ€™s blackbox. They filled the ship with â€œvaluableâ€ stuff as a decoy in case it got attacked. The plan worked a little too well and the cargo might have attracted the wrong kind of attention. They stole all the cargo but missed the blackbox. Bad news is the ship is now swarming with outlaws.

The data on that blackbox is useless to them, but we need it. If you can get it back for us, we can give you a nice cut from what we make. Seems like a fair deal, right?

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and after youâ€™ve done your thing take the flight recorder to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

rawKeys.Foxwell_EliminateSpecific_desc_001:
Looking to execute a bounty on <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>. Weâ€™ve learned that theyâ€™re currently hiding out with some confederates at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Iâ€™d be prepared to deal with the lowlifes hanging around <EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4>, but our only real concern is that you land the target. 
    

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

rawKeys.TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_1:

rawKeys.TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_3:

rawKeys.headhunters_bombingrun_VH_desc_001:
Got a plan to take care of a rat I've been dealing with and need a hand.

Had a client default on some debts and now they've decided they ain't going to pay up. Got a tip that they're hiding out over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. If you can take out their fuel tanks they'll have no choice but to reconsider their crap decisions.

Just be sure you don't underestimate this slimebag. They might be dumb but they're not stupid, if you get me. I've heard this place is swarming with ships and turrets, you'd have to be a total nullbrain not to bring backup.

-Stows out
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_gen_mrt_desc_001:
Another gang tried to make a move and carve out some territory for themselves. They failed but Headhunters don't forget. We've taken out most of them but one of the last members named ~mission(TargetName) has been spotted flying around ~mission(Location|Address).

Odds are they're getting desperate, so don't underestimate them in the fight.

You'll get paid when it's done.

Stows out.
rawKeys.Eckhart_ShipAmbush_H_desc:

Looking for a competent contractor who can recruit a wingman to help execute an ambush. The target is a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> which has been involved in several operations against one of our most important clients. By neutralizing it once and for all, itâ€™ll make our clientâ€™s life a hell of a lot easier. While the ~mission(AmbushTarget) is our focus, they usually donâ€™t fly anywhere without a sizable escort, including large craft. 

Weâ€™ve gotten word that this group will be passing by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. Any chance you could hurry and beat them there? That spot has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that you can power down your ship and hide in. Then when they pass, you should have the upper hand.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client knows this one will be tough, so they threw in a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> thatâ€™ll go to the main contractor.

rawKeys.headhunters_eliminateall_XT_derelicts_de:
One of our Judges caught wind of XenoThreat trying to move in on our territory. Seems like theyâ€™re trying to take over ~mission(Location|Address). We donâ€™t want to let those psychos get any more of a foothold in system than they already have, so weâ€™re putting some creds on the line to get â€˜em to back off.

We want you to come down on them hard. Donâ€™t let up till the whole place is a graveyard. Weâ€™ll send your payment once the bodies are ready to bury.

- Stows out.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc:
Maybe Wikelo not have something you want made (that strange, but okay). Old souli would give out <EM4>favors</EM4>, very good way to prove that you do work for me. Collect enough and trade when I have something you want.

Bring things to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will trade for favor.

Bye.
rawKeys.Tutorial01_MissionDesc:
Congratulations on taking your first steps into the universe!

Over the course of this tutorial, youâ€™ll learn how to get around both on foot and in space. 

First up is helping you familiarize yourself with some basic movement controls and the use of your mobiGlas while still inside your â€œHabâ€ (or habitation). Follow the objectives and hints on your HUD (heads-up display) to proceed through this mission.
rawKeys.Tutorial02_MissionDesc:
Well done!

With the first part behind you, you should now have some basic familiarity with the movement controls, managing your hunger and thirst, and some of the core functionality of your mobiGlas â€“ namely the Contract Manager and your Journal.

This next section will help you familiarize yourself with ~mission(Location|Name) and take you to visit ~mission(StoreName), a weapons store here in ~mission(Location|Name).

You can shop there, and at other stores like it, using United Earth Credits (UEC). During the Alpha phase of Star Citizenâ€™s development, we will be using a currency called aUEC (Alpha United Earth Credits). This is a temporary currency specifically designed for testing the in-game economy and balance.
rawKeys.Tutorial03_MissionDesc:
Youâ€™re almost through with the tutorial. All that remains is to take flight!

With your business in ~mission(Location|Name) finished, itâ€™s time to leave the city â€“ and eventually the planet. Make your way to the ~mission(TransitNameShort) transit shuttles. These shuttles can take you all around ~mission(Location|Name) â€“ but your destination is the spaceport, where an Anvil C8 Pisces has been temporarily provided for you.

This snub scouting ship is a great starter vessel, perfect for new pilots looking to get their wings.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Intrepid_Desc: If you are looking for Intrepid ship that more intrepid. Wikelo can help. Bring things and you will get special touches on ship by Wikelo and pretty new coat to it. Bye.
rawKeys.northrock_boarders_890J_desc_001:
An executive client just informed us that their 890 Jump had been intercepted at ~mission(Location) and boarded by outlaws. They would prefer to have this handled privately owing to the sensitive nature of proprietary data that's being stored aboard. 

Your first priority will be to clear all outlaws as quickly as possible so that a recovery team can be dispatched to return the ship to the owner. The longer the outlaws have control of the vessel, the higher the chance it will be lost. I recommend you acquire a team for this outing to expedite matters. 

Note that thanks to a small contingent of Security Personnel who stayed aboard, all surviving members of the crew were able to flee in an escape craft. The current status of the remaining security is unknown, but just in case, keep an eye out for friendlies when you engage the hostiles.

Secondly, if at all possible, the client is *very* interested in preventing the theft of the aforementioned data. If you are able to stop the theft of their confidential data stores before they are transmitted, a generous bonus will be issued.

Needless to say, this is a client I would very much like to keep happy. 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
rawKeys.Kaboos_Intro_Description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Unknown
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec has been enlisted by the UEE to gather intel on a group of <EM4>black marketeers dealing in Vanduul parts</EM4>, that have been linked to the illegal Vanduul experiments happening at ASDâ€™s Onyx Facility. The UEE is eager to understand and put an end to their operations.

Based on evidence extracted from the ASD facilities, weâ€™ve potentially managed to track down the location of one of their storage sites.

Once accepted, head over to the old <EM4>QV Planet Services Logistics station</EM4> and weâ€™ll be in touch.


Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractorâ€™s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

rawKeys.Hockrow_searchbody_space_S_Desc_001:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP70001
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
In need of a highly competent operator for a special assignment. A highly dangerous outlaw that has been evading local authorities for some time has been reported to have been involved in a large-scale ship battle, resulting in their supposed death. Our client wishes to confirm that they have been neutralized.

Contract Investigator Actions:
We require you to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> locate <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>â€™s body and confirm their death.

Additional Notes:
Serious preparation is advised for this contract as there is a strong potential for there to be highly aggressive and dangerous hostiles still on site. Arm yourself accordingly and consider bring other skilled pilots with you.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Lunch_Desc:
You humans keep Wikelo very busy. Work more than when I at old souli. But Wikelo very hungry now and can't get food.

Please help. Bring food and drink to Wikelo Emporium at <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>.

Very appreciate your help. Will give thing in return.

Bye.
rawKeys.Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_VeryHard_Title_: Very Long Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
rawKeys.Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_VeryHard_Desc_0:
Hiya,

Covalex requires a safe pair of hands to pick up some packages and get them where they need to go.

Designating this a long distance delivery so stock up on fuel and supplies. And definitely make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

As for what ship to bring, you'll also need something that can move <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
rawKeys.Eckhart_EscortShips_H_desc:

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

In need of a contractor who can report in now. A client has found themselves in hot water over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and a protection detail to get away from an asteroid base. Theyâ€™ve reported multiple, well-armed hostile ships meaning youâ€™ll need a crew of your own to deal with them. Based on the clientâ€™s account, these attackers seem highly motivated so they will likely not back down easily.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
rawKeys.RAIN_collectresources_multiple_OLP_desc_:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of three resources essential for their experiments: <EM4>saldynium, jaclium, and carinite</EM4>.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, weâ€™ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

Though we havenâ€™t been able to do thorough scans, thereâ€™s a strong belief among our teams that Hathorâ€™s defunct Orbital Laser Platforms were built above areas with a high concentration of these resources. Reactivating these OLP could be your best hope of acquiring what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_gen_vlrt_rank0_desc:
You know us. You know what we do. Systemâ€™s getting a little crowded, so weâ€™re looking for some good soldiers to help keep our place here.

If youâ€™re up for it and donâ€™t mind getting your hands dirty, weâ€™ve got something to prove youâ€™ve got the stuff weâ€™re looking for.

~mission(TargetName) was a former member who sold us out to XenoThreat and got some of their brothers and sisters killed. Now they think they can just live their life without consequence.

You take them out. You get boosted in. Sounds like a fair trade.

Theyâ€™ve been spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so get there and take care of it.

Stows out.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Conversion_SpecialFavors_De:
Wikelo need large amounts of <EM4>quantainium</EM4> and is willing to give you nice Polaris in exchange but also know many humans not have much space, so you trade as you go. Wikelo will you <EM4>Polaris bits</EM4> if you want trade quantainium. Work like favors. Help Wikelo remember how much you give. 

Bring quantainium to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will trade for bits.

Bye.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Constellation_Taurus_: Wikelo came across plans to build Constellation Taurus ship. Nice ship, but Wikelo make a little better. Prettier too. If you want, bring stuff.
rawKeys.headhunters_killship_gen_hrt_desc_001:
We got a greenlight to finally take out ~mission(TargetName). They've been a pain in our ass ever since they came to the system a few years ago and it's finally time to take them out once and for all. 

We've gotten word that ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying near ~mission(Location|Address) and the Judge wants this handled now.

Take 'em out.

- Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_XenoThreat:
Here's the deal, we just got word that a XenoThreat power player named ~mission(TargetName) just came out of hiding and was spotted at ~mission(Location|Address). 

Headhunters have been hungry to put this asshole in the ground for months, so we launched an assault against the outpost, but the Judge wants to make sure ~mission(TargetName|Last) doesn't slip away, so they want to use you as insurance.

This'll be a tough kill in the middle of a warzone, but we'll pay out if you pull it off.

Stows out.
rawKeys.headhunters_bombingrun_H_desc_001:
Look, Headhunters don't waste time on petty revenge, but I'm not about to let this nonsense fly either.

Some asshole took out a bunch of my crew and has been bragging all over about it. I've also heard that this nullbrain is stockpiling quantum fuel over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. I'd like to see how they deal with some real heat when you fly over there and burn everything they've built to the ground. Oh, and with the amount of firepower they got gathered over there, wouldn't be smart to fly alone on this one, so take a crew with you.

-Stows out
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Terrapin_Medic_Desc: Wikelo not know this Human word but ship is very useful when things go danger. If you want, can give new version of it. Maybe more useful?\n\nYou fly and tell. Bye.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_Kruger_Wolf_Desc: If you want to be quiet and surprise people, this is the Wolf you want. Wikelo mod it to be extra stealth. Trade you for it when you bring me the items I want.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Intro_Desc:
Hello, I am Wikelo. Recent addition to your system and very excited to be here. Spent many time here in UEE and happy to spent more.

Have place where I make things from other things.

Need person to bring me useful things to finish project I work on. You have list. Get, please. I am at <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>.

Will give you item for your help.

Also, when done, if you want to do more. Have many things can make in my humble shop. Come, look at pretty poster and then decide what you want me to make.

Bye.
rawKeys.TheCollector_Ships_F7_MK2_Desc: Know how much you Humans like Navy so Wikelo have one now. If you want Wikelo version of F7 mk2, bring me things and you are in. Very funny. Bye.
rawKeys.headhunters_sabotage_servers_M_CFP_title: Wipe Citizens for Prosperity Data Farm
rawKeys.headhunters_sabotage_servers_M_CFP_desc_:
Turns out those Citizens for Prosperity bastards have been gathering intel on us. They're going to try to cut us off from several revenue streams and bleed us dry. Can't let that happen. 

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy their data storage. 

That should teach them not to stick their noses where they don't belong.

-Stows out
rawKeys.headhunters_sabotage_servers_H_XT_desc_0:
Something just fell into my lap that is way too good to pass up. XenoThreat's intelligence gathering is a bit of legend in the circles I run in and it turns out that they're storing a whole heap of their best intel at ~mission(Location|Address).

Would be a shame if someone, say like you, were to go there and blow it all up, huh? 

-Stows out
rawKeys.HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Super_Descripti:
Thisâ€™ll be a fun one for you. We just got word that a transport ship has broken down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Only problem is, every skag and their mother seems to know about it. Place is crawling with all kinds of outlaws trying to get their hands on the cargo onboard. Thatâ€™s where you come in.

If you can get your best pilots together and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> you can take out the competition and snag the cargo. It ainâ€™t gonna be easy though. One of my scouts said the assholes guarding this ship have got some serious tech on them.  

Iâ€™ve already got a buyer waiting, you just need to take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and Iâ€™ll send you the creds.

Stows out.
rawKeys.roughready_salvage_E_desc_001:
Had a few wrecked ships towed to ~mission(Location|Address). Theyâ€™re fully out of commission and in dire need of scrapping. If youâ€™re interested in salvaging whatâ€™s left, it can be all yours, for a fair price, too.

Plus, you donâ€™t have to worry much about any distractions while youâ€™re workinâ€™ since youâ€™ll be near one of our stations and we make sure folks behave themselves.

- Smokey
rawKeys.deadsaints_recoveritem_E_Desc_001:
Not sure how the hell this happened, but my pilotâ€™s gone and got themselves killed over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. If you want to die on your own time, thatâ€™s your business, but they did it while carrying a stash for me. Now I gotta have someone go out there and finish their work.

Take the two packages to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4> and Iâ€™ll have one of my crew collect it later. If you see those assholes who took out my pilot, give â€˜em hell.

-Twitch
rawKeys.bitzeros_shipheist_H_XT_desc_001:
You know who probably deserves taking down a peg or two? XenoThreat. 

We pulled some intel off a server that had details of all their upcoming operations, and for the right price, we could send you the exact coordinates of where an XT ship fully loaded with primo cargo is waiting. 

Hereâ€™s a little taste of what info we have so you know weâ€™re not messing around. XenoThreat stashed the ship in a locked asteroid base hangar that can only be accessed via the stationâ€™s elevators. We canâ€™t get the hangar doors open for you but have adjusted the security protocols so youâ€™ll be able to use a console in the hangar to override the lockdown.  

Interested?

57 65 65 76 69 6c
rawKeys.headhunters_EliminateSpecific_XenoThreat:
Headhunters just rallied up a crew to go hit ~mission(Location|Address) and wipe out the XenoThreat there, but I'm looking to add some extra insurance. 

See there's this heavy hitter there named ~mission(TargetName) who's up in the XenoThreat command structure and we want them taken out. Every other one you kill is gravy, but they're your prime target.

-Stows
rawKeys.Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Pyro_Nyx_VH: XL Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials

POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. rawKeys.Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VE_title_001: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
rawKeys.Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VE_desc_001:
Care to help us ghost a bad guy? 

Weâ€™ve been hired to hunt down an outlaw flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Shouldnâ€™t be too hard since they take the same flightpath each day. That makes them a prime target for an ambush if I ever saw one. Iâ€™ve analyzed the route and determined that <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is the ideal spot to strike. Thereâ€™s an emission cloud there thatâ€™ll be perfect to hide your shipâ€™s signature while you wait.   

Job is simple if youâ€™re interested. Head to the location, hide out, power down, and then wait for them to fly by. Sometimes they roll alone but they often have other single-seat ships with them. Shouldnâ€™t be too hard to handle for a pro. Plus, weâ€™ll still have reinforcements nearby and ready to deploy once it pops off.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,


Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_EliminateAll_PAF_M_title_001: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Out PAF
rawKeys.Foxwell_EliminateAll_PAF_M_desc_001:
Weâ€™ve been tracking a group of outlaws whoâ€™ve been causing trouble for one of our clients. Seems theyâ€™ve taken up residence at an old Hathor facility. Donâ€™t know what their plans with that old facility are but our client is eager to have them taken care of.

Looking for someone to go to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and neutralize these targets.


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Tit: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Shipjacking Group
rawKeys.Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des:
There's a small group of criminals that have been marking their territory, striking out any freighters that get close enough. They got a little too greedy though, because now someone's paying us to go deal with them.

Once you and whoever you're bringing are ready, go to ~mission(Location|Address) and engage with these criminals. Since they like to fly in separate packs, be sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_DefendLocation_E_Desc_001:
Ships coming and going from <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are being targeted by hostile forces. The folks there have hired us to deal with this problem immediately.

Need someone to get there pronto and start fighting off these ships. The situation appears to be constantly evolving, so Iâ€™ll keep you updated on where youâ€™re needed most. 

For the hustle and effort, weâ€™ll also be paying a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for dealing with this.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_bombingrun_E_desc_001:
We've just received the location of an outlaw outpost where some up-and-coming criminals have been hanging out. Now, our client says there's no reason to engage these folks directly. Instead you will be targeting their supply lines.

Fly on over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel stores while dealing with any minimal resistance they may put up. It will be your call on how much you engage with the hostile forces, just don't forget that your main objective is ensuring those fuel tanks are out of action.

This is a yellow level contract so pay will be proportionate.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_bombingrun_VE_title_001: Yellow Level Contract: Limiting Potential Threat
rawKeys.Foxwell_bombingrun_VE_desc_001:
A bunch of outlaws have been harassing our client and recently things have taken a turn for the worse. They've taken over their property and we've exhausted all other options.

We need a decent pilot to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you can cut off their supplies, you can pave the way for the client to take back their property.

This shouldn't be a tough one. You might run into a ship or two and maybe a few turrets, but you've been authorized to use lethal force. All we need for you to do is get in there, get the fuel tanks, and get out.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_EliminateAll_OLP_M_desc_001:
Weâ€™ve been following a group of outlaws on behalf of a client, and it looks like theyâ€™ve taken a permanent pit stop on an old orbital platform. 

Weâ€™re looking for a contractor who can head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and neutralize the targets. The platform is crawling with a bunch of armed and dangerous thugs, so weâ€™ve designated this a yellow level contract.


Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Tit: Yellow Level Contract: Neutralize Shipjacking Gang
rawKeys.Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des:
Okay, this might be a bit of stretch to do on your own, so if you got any favors to call in, it could be good to cash those chits now. There's a group of desperados striking delivery ships up and down this sector and we've been tasked with cleaning them up. 

Once your crew is ready, head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take the hostiles there down. Now, these bastards are a bit clever so they tend to split up into smaller packs. Make sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives."
rawKeys.Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001:
Time to knock out a routine patrol for one of our long-term clients. The route is a series of waypoints that need to be visited and scanned to confirm everythingâ€™s as expected. Should be simple enough.  

If interested, please accept and head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD to start. Pull this off and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
rawKeys.Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001:
Need someone to knock out a security patrol. Youâ€™ll need to go to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and then scan several designated waypoints ensuring that theyâ€™re safe and secure. 

Satellites in that region have been acting up recently. Not exactly sure whatâ€™s going on out there, but best be prepared in case thereâ€™s any trouble.

rawKeys.Covalex_HaulCargo_AToB_Rehire_desc:
Hey,

Have a bit of good news for you. Covalex recently finished an evaluation of our contractor pool, and decided to reconsider your status as a cargo hauler. To requalify, all you need is to successfully complete the following delivery.

Pick up <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and deliver it to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. In order to complete this haul in a fast and efficient manner, you'll need a ship that can haul <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Hopefully everything goes smoothly so we can welcome you back to the team.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

rawKeys.Covalex_HaulCargo_AToB_Intro_desc:
Earning such accolades as 'Imperial Finances' Top 10 Shipping Companies' and 'Delivery Digest's 2945's Most Trusted Transport,' Covalex is busier than ever. And that means more cargo going to more places. That's where you come in.  

Covalex is looking for dependable and industrious pilots to join our expanding family. Do you have access to a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>? Can you pass an Advocacy background check if required? Then a universe of opportunity is waiting for you. 

Simply complete an 'Evaluation Trialâ€™ by picking up a shipment of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and successfully delivering it to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Upon satisfactory completion, you'll be eligible to become part of Covalex Shipping's vast network of independent transport specialists*.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.

'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'
